summary: This paper proposes a robust, high-precision positioning methodology to address localization failures arising from complex background interference in large-scale flight navigation and the computational inefficiency inherent in conventional sliding window matching techniques. The proposed methodology employs a three-tiered framework incorporating multi-layer corner screening and adaptive template matching. Firstly, dimensionality is reduced through illumination equalization and structural information extraction. A coarse-to-fine candidate selection strategy minimizes sliding window computational costs, enabling rapid estimation of the marker's position. Finally, adaptive templates are generated for candidate points, achieving subpixel precision through improved template matching with correlation coefficient extremum fitting. Experimental results demonstrate the method's effectiveness in extracting and localizing diagonal markers in complex, large-scale environments, making it ideal for field-of-view measurement in navigation tasks.
tldr: This paper presents a robust subpixel localization method for diagonal markers in large-scale navigation using multi-layer screening and adaptive matching to address localization failures and computational inefficiency in complex environments. Results show effectiveness in diagonal marker localization, making it suitable for field-of-view measurements in navigation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种鲁棒的亚像素定位方法，该方法使用多层筛选和自适应匹配来定位大型导航中对角标记，旨在解决复杂环境中定位失败和计算效率低下的问题。实验结果表明，该方法能够有效地提取和定位对角标记，适合导航任务中的视场测量。
summary_zh: 本文提出一种鲁棒、高精度的定位方法，旨在解决大规模飞行导航中复杂背景干扰引起的定位失败以及传统滑动窗口匹配技术固有的计算效率低下问题。所提出的方法采用一个三层框架，该框架包含多层角点筛选和自适应模板匹配。首先，通过光照均衡和结构信息提取来降低维度。一种由粗到精的候选点选择策略最大限度地减少了滑动窗口的计算成本，从而能够快速估计标记的位置。最后，为候选点生成自适应模板，通过改进的模板匹配以及相关系数极值拟合实现亚像素精度。实验结果表明该方法在复杂、大规模环境中提取和定位对角线标记方面的有效性，使其非常适合导航任务中的视场测量。

title: The embodied brain: Bridging the brain, body, and behavior with neuromechanical digital twins
summary: Animal behavior reflects interactions between the nervous system, body, and environment. Therefore, biomechanics and environmental context must be considered to dissect algorithms for behavioral control. This is enabled by leveraging neuromechanical digital twins: computational models that embed artificial neural controllers within realistic body models in simulated environments. Here we review advances in the creation and use of neuromechanical digital twins while also highlighting emerging opportunities for the future. First, we illustrate how neuromechanical models allow researchers to infer hidden biophysical variables that may be difficult to measure experimentally. Additionally, by perturbing these models, one can generate new experimentally testable hypotheses. Next, we explore how neuromechanical twins have been used to foster a deeper exchange between neuroscience, robotics, and machine learning. Finally, we show how neuromechanical twins can advance healthcare. We envision that coupling studies on animals with active probing of their neuromechanical twins will greatly accelerate neuroscientific discovery.
tldr: The paper reviews the use of neuromechanical digital twins (computational models embedding neural controllers within realistic body models) to study animal behavior, infer hidden biophysical variables, and advance neuroscience, robotics, and healthcare.
tldr_zh: 本文综述了神经机械数字孪生（将神经控制器嵌入到逼真身体模型中的计算模型）在研究动物行为、推断隐藏生物物理变量以及推进神经科学、机器人学和医疗保健方面的应用。
summary_zh: 动物行为反映了神经系统、身体和环境之间的相互作用。因此，为了剖析行为控制的算法，必须考虑生物力学和环境背景。这可以通过利用神经机械数字孪生来实现：这是一种计算模型，将人工神经控制器嵌入到模拟环境中逼真的身体模型中。本文回顾了神经机械数字孪生的创建和应用方面的进展，同时强调了未来涌现的机遇。首先，我们阐述了神经机械模型如何使研究人员能够推断出难以通过实验测量的隐藏生物物理变量。此外，通过扰动这些模型，可以产生新的、可进行实验验证的假设。其次，我们探讨了神经机械孪生如何被用于促进神经科学、机器人学和机器学习之间更深入的交流。最后，我们展示了神经机械孪生如何推进医疗保健的发展。我们期望将动物研究与对它们的神经机械数字孪生的主动探测相结合，将极大地加速神经科学的发现。

title: Data-driven control of hydraulic impact hammers under strict operational and control constraints
summary: This paper presents a data-driven methodology for the control of static hydraulic impact hammers, also known as rock breakers, which are commonly used in the mining industry. The task addressed in this work is that of controlling the rock-breaker so its end-effector reaches arbitrary target poses, which is required in normal operation to place the hammer on top of rocks that need to be fractured. The proposed approach considers several constraints, such as unobserved state variables due to limited sensing and the strict requirement of using a discrete control interface at the joint level. First, the proposed methodology addresses the problem of system identification to obtain an approximate dynamic model of the hydraulic arm. This is done via supervised learning, using only teleoperation data. The learned dynamic model is then exploited to obtain a controller capable of reaching target end-effector poses. For policy synthesis, both reinforcement learning (RL) and model predictive control (MPC) algorithms are utilized and contrasted. As a case study, we consider the automation of a Bobcat E10 mini-excavator arm with a hydraulic impact hammer attached as end-effector. Using this machine, both the system identification and policy synthesis stages are studied in simulation and in the real world. The best RL-based policy consistently reaches target end-effector poses with position errors below 12 cm and pitch angle errors below 0.08 rad in the real world. Considering that the impact hammer has a 4 cm diameter chisel, this level of precision is sufficient for breaking rocks. Notably, this is accomplished by relying only on approximately 68 min of teleoperation data to train and 8 min to evaluate the dynamic model, and without performing any adjustments for a successful policy Sim2Real transfer. A demonstration of policy execution in the real world can be found in https://youtu.be/e-7tDhZ4ZgA.
tldr: This paper presents a data-driven approach using reinforcement learning and model predictive control to control hydraulic impact hammers, demonstrating successful Sim2Real transfer for precise rock breaking with limited teleoperation data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法，利用强化学习和模型预测控制来控制液压冲击锤，展示了成功的Sim2Real迁移，只需有限的遥操作数据即可实现精确的岩石破碎。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种数据驱动的方法，用于控制静态液压冲击锤，也称为破碎锤，该设备广泛应用于采矿业。本研究解决的任务是控制破碎锤，使其末端执行器达到任意目标姿态，这是正常操作中将锤放置在需要破碎的岩石顶部所必需的。所提出的方法考虑了多种约束，例如由于有限传感而导致的未观测到的状态变量，以及在关节层面使用离散控制接口的严格要求。首先，该方法解决了系统识别问题，以获得液压臂的近似动态模型。这通过监督学习实现，仅使用遥操作数据。然后利用学习到的动态模型来获得能够达到目标末端执行器姿态的控制器。对于策略合成，采用了强化学习 (RL) 和模型预测控制 (MPC)算法，并进行了对比。作为一个案例研究，我们考虑了将带有液压冲击锤作为末端执行器的Bobcat E10 迷你挖掘机臂的自动化。使用该机器，在仿真和真实环境中研究了系统识别和策略合成阶段。在真实环境中，最佳的基于RL的策略始终能达到目标末端执行器姿态，位置误差低于12厘米，俯仰角误差低于0.08弧度。考虑到冲击锤具有4厘米直径的凿子，这种精度水平足以破碎岩石。值得注意的是，这是仅依靠大约 68 分钟的遥操作数据来训练和 8 分钟来评估动态模型来实现的，并且无需进行任何调整即可成功进行策略Sim2Real迁移。真实世界中策略执行的演示可在 https://youtu.be/e-7tDhZ4ZgA 找到。

title: Hybrid Distillation with CoT Guidance for Edge-Drone Control Code Generation
summary: With large language models demonstrating significant potential in code generation tasks, their application to onboard control of resource-constrained Unmanned Aerial Vehicles has emerged as an important research direction. However, a notable contradiction exists between the high resource consumption of large models and the real-time, lightweight requirements of UAV platforms. This paper proposes an integrated approach that combines knowledge distillation, chain-of-thought guidance, and supervised fine-tuning for UAV multi-SDK control tasks, aiming to efficiently transfer complex reasoning and code generation capabilities to smaller models. Firstly, a high-quality dataset covering various mainstream UAV SDKs is constructed, featuring instruction-code-reasoning chains, and incorporates counterfactual negative samples for data augmentation, guiding the model to learn the end-to-end logic from instruction parsing to code generation. Secondly, leveraging DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite quantized via QLoRA as the teacher model, and based on a hybrid black-box and white-box distillation strategy, high-quality chain-of-thought soft labels are generated. These are combined with a weighted cross-entropy loss using hard labels to transfer complex reasoning capabilities to the smaller student model. Finally, through prompt tuning engineering optimized for the UAV control scenario, the model performance on core tasks such as SDK type recognition and function call matching is enhanced. Experimental results indicate that the distilled lightweight model maintains high code generation accuracy while achieving significant improvements in deployment and inference efficiency, effectively demonstrating the feasibility and superiority of our approach in achieving precise and lightweight intelligent control for UAVs
tldr: This paper proposes a knowledge distillation approach with chain-of-thought guidance to transfer code generation capabilities from large language models to smaller, resource-constrained models for UAV control, achieving high accuracy with improved efficiency.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于链式思维引导的知识蒸馏方法，将代码生成能力从大型语言模型迁移到资源受限的无人机控制的小型模型，在提高效率的同时实现了高精度。
summary_zh: 随着大型语言模型在代码生成任务中展现出显著潜力，将其应用于资源受限的无人机（UAV）的机载控制已成为重要的研究方向。然而，大型模型的高资源消耗与无人机平台对实时性和轻量化的需求之间存在显著矛盾。本文提出一种集成方法，结合了知识蒸馏、思维链引导和监督式微调，用于无人机多SDK控制任务，旨在高效地将复杂的推理和代码生成能力迁移到更小的模型。首先，构建了一个高质量数据集，覆盖了各种主流无人机SDK，其特点是包含指令-代码-推理链，并纳入反事实负样本进行数据增强，引导模型学习从指令解析到代码生成的端到端逻辑。其次，利用通过QLoRA量化的DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite作为教师模型，并基于一种混合黑盒和白盒蒸馏策略，生成高质量的思维链软标签。这些软标签与使用硬标签的加权交叉熵损失相结合，从而将复杂的推理能力迁移到较小的学生模型。最后，通过针对无人机控制场景优化的提示调优工程，提高了模型在SDK类型识别和函数调用匹配等核心任务上的性能。实验结果表明，经蒸馏的轻量级模型在保持高代码生成精度的同时，实现了部署和推理效率的显著提升，有效证明了我们的方法在实现无人机精确且轻量级智能控制方面的可行性和优越性。

title: Large Artificial Intelligence Model Guided Deep Reinforcement Learning for Resource Allocation in Non Terrestrial Networks
summary: Large AI Model (LAM) have been proposed to applications of Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), that offer better performance with its great generalization and reduced task specific trainings. In this paper, we propose a Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) agent that is guided by a Large Language Model (LLM). The LLM operates as a high level coordinator that generates textual guidance that shape the reward of the DRL agent during training. The results show that the LAM-DRL outperforms the traditional DRL by 40% in nominal weather scenarios and 64% in extreme weather scenarios compared to heuristics in terms of throughput, fairness, and outage probability.
tldr: This paper proposes a Large Language Model (LLM) guided Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) agent for resource allocation in Non-Terrestrial Networks (NTN), demonstrating significant performance improvements over traditional DRL and heuristics.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种由大型语言模型 (LLM) 指导的深度强化学习 (DRL) 代理，用于非地面网络 (NTN) 中的资源分配，与传统 DRL 和启发式方法相比，性能显着提高。
summary_zh: 大型人工智能模型（LAM）已被提议应用于非地面网络（NTN），凭借其强大的泛化能力和减少特定任务训练的特性，提供了更优越的性能。本文提出一种由大型语言模型(LLM)引导的深度强化学习（DRL）智能体。LLM作为高级协调器，生成文本指导来塑造DRL智能体在训练期间的奖励。结果表明，在吞吐量、公平性和中断概率方面，与启发式算法相比，LAM-DRL在正常天气场景下优于传统DRL 40%，在极端天气场景下优于传统DRL 64%。

title: Autonomous Materials Exploration by Integrating Automated Phase Identification and AI-Assisted Human Reasoning
summary: Autonomous experimentation holds the potential to accelerate materials development by combining artificial intelligence (AI) with modular robotic platforms to explore extensive combinatorial chemical and processing spaces. Such self-driving laboratories can not only increase the throughput of repetitive experiments, but also incorporate human domain expertise to drive the search towards user-defined objectives, including improved materials performance metrics. We present an autonomous materials synthesis extension to SARA, the Scientific Autonomous Reasoning Agent, utilizing phase information provided by an automated probabilistic phase labeling algorithm to expedite the search for targeted phase regions. By incorporating human input into an expanded SARA-H (SARA with human-in-the-loop) framework, we enhance the efficiency of the underlying reasoning process. Using synthetic benchmarks, we demonstrate the efficiency of our AI implementation and show that the human input can contribute to significant improvement in sampling efficiency. We conduct experimental active learning campaigns using robotic processing of thin-film samples of several oxide material systems, including Bi$_2$O$_3$, SnO$_x$, and Bi-Ti-O, using lateral-gradient laser spike annealing to synthesize and kinetically trap metastable phases. We showcase the utility of human-in-the-loop autonomous experimentation for the Bi-Ti-O system, where we identify extensive processing domains that stabilize $δ$-Bi$_2$O$_3$ and Bi$_2$Ti$_2$O$_7$, explore dwell-dependent ternary oxide phase behavior, and provide evidence confirming predictions that cationic substitutional doping of TiO$_2$ with Bi inhibits the unfavorable transformation of the metastable anatase to the ground-state rutile phase. The autonomous methods we have developed enable the discovery of new materials and new understanding of materials synthesis and properties.
tldr: This paper presents an autonomous materials synthesis system, SARA-H, leveraging AI, robotic experimentation, and human-in-the-loop feedback for efficient materials discovery and understanding, demonstrated through experiments on oxide material systems.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种自主材料合成系统SARA-H，该系统利用人工智能、机器人实验和人机交互反馈，以实现高效的材料发现和理解。通过氧化物材料系统的实验展示了该系统的有效性。
summary_zh: 自主实验有望通过将人工智能（AI）与模块化机器人平台相结合来探索广泛的组合化学和工艺空间，从而加速材料开发。这种自驱动实验室不仅可以提高重复实验的通量，还可以整合人类领域专业知识，以驱动搜索朝着用户定义的目标前进，包括改进材料性能指标。我们提出了对SARA（科学自主推理代理）的自主材料合成扩展，利用由自动化概率相标记算法提供的相信息来加速搜索目标相区域。通过将人类输入整合到扩展的SARA-H（具有人环绕的SARA）框架中，我们提高了底层推理过程的效率。使用合成基准，我们展示了我们AI实现的效率，并表明人类输入可以显著提高采样效率。我们使用机器人处理几种氧化物材料体系（包括Bi$_2$O$_3$、SnO$_x$和Bi-Ti-O）的薄膜样品进行实验性的主动学习活动，并使用横向梯度激光尖峰退火合成和动态捕获亚稳相。我们展示了人环绕自主实验在Bi-Ti-O体系中的效用，在该体系中，我们识别出稳定δ-Bi$_2$O$_3$和Bi$_2$Ti$_2$O$_7$的广泛工艺区域，探索了停留时间依赖性的三元氧化物相行为，并提供了证据证实了以下预测：用Bi进行TiO$_2$的阳离子取代掺杂会抑制亚稳态锐钛矿向基态金红石相的不利转变。我们开发的自主方法能够发现新材料，并对材料合成和性能产生新的理解。

title: ZeroDVFS: Zero-Shot LLM-Guided Core and Frequency Allocation for Embedded Platforms
summary: Dynamic voltage and frequency scaling (DVFS) and task-to-core allocation are critical for thermal management and balancing energy and performance in embedded systems. Existing approaches either rely on utilization-based heuristics that overlook stall times, or require extensive offline profiling for table generation, preventing runtime adaptation. We propose a model-based hierarchical multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for thermal- and energy-aware scheduling on multi-core platforms. Two collaborative agents decompose the exponential action space, achieving 358ms latency for subsequent decisions. First decisions require 3.5 to 8.0s including one-time LLM feature extraction. An accurate environment model leverages regression techniques to predict thermal dynamics and performance states. When combined with LLM-extracted semantic features, the environment model enables zero-shot deployment for new workloads on trained platforms by generating synthetic training data without requiring workload-specific profiling samples. We introduce LLM-based semantic feature extraction that characterizes OpenMP programs through 13 code-level features without execution. The Dyna-Q-inspired framework integrates direct reinforcement learning with model-based planning, achieving 20x faster convergence than model-free methods. Experiments on BOTS and PolybenchC benchmarks across NVIDIA Jetson TX2, Jetson Orin NX, RubikPi, and Intel Core i7 demonstrate 7.09x better energy efficiency and 4.0x better makespan than Linux ondemand governor. First-decision latency is 8,300x faster than table-based profiling, enabling practical deployment in dynamic embedded systems.
tldr: This paper presents ZeroDVFS, a zero-shot dynamic voltage and frequency scaling framework for embedded systems using LLM-extracted features and hierarchical MARL, achieving significant energy efficiency and makespan improvements compared to standard Linux governors without workload-specific profiling.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了ZeroDVFS，一个基于LLM特征提取和分层MARL的零样本动态电压和频率调节框架，用于嵌入式系统，与标准Linux调控器相比，实现了显著的能源效率和完工时间改进，且无需特定于工作负载的分析。
summary_zh: 动态电压频率调整(DVFS)和任务到核心的分配对于嵌入式系统中的热管理以及能量和性能平衡至关重要。现有方法要么依赖于忽略停顿时间的基于利用率的启发式方法，要么需要大量的离线分析来生成表格，从而阻碍了运行时自适应。我们提出了一种基于模型的层级多智能体强化学习(MARL)框架，用于多核平台上的热感知和能量感知调度。两个协同智能体分解了指数级的动作空间，使得后续决策的延迟达到358毫秒。初始决策需要3.5到8.0秒，包括一次性的大型语言模型(LLM)特征提取。一个精确的环境模型利用回归技术来预测热动力学和性能状态。当与LLM提取的语义特征相结合时，环境模型通过生成合成训练数据而无需特定于工作负载的分析样本，从而实现已训练平台上的新工作负载的零样本部署。我们引入了基于LLM的语义特征提取，无需执行即可通过13个代码级特征来表征OpenMP程序。受Dyna-Q启发的框架将直接强化学习与基于模型的规划相结合，实现比无模型方法快20倍的收敛速度。在NVIDIA Jetson TX2、Jetson Orin NX、RubikPi和Intel Core i7上对BOTS和PolybenchC基准进行的实验表明，其能源效率比Linux ondemand调控器提高了7.09倍，完工时间缩短了4.0倍。初始决策延迟比基于表格的分析快8,300倍，从而实现了在动态嵌入式系统中的实际部署。

title: Project Synapse: A Hierarchical Multi-Agent Framework with Hybrid Memory for Autonomous Resolution of Last-Mile Delivery Disruptions
summary: This paper introduces Project Synapse, a novel agentic framework designed for the autonomous resolution of last-mile delivery disruptions. Synapse employs a hierarchical multi-agent architecture in which a central Resolution Supervisor agent performs strategic task decomposition and delegates subtasks to specialized worker agents responsible for tactical execution. The system is orchestrated using LangGraph to manage complex and cyclical workflows. To validate the framework, a benchmark dataset of 30 complex disruption scenarios was curated from a qualitative analysis of over 6,000 real-world user reviews. System performance is evaluated using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol with explicit bias mitigation.
tldr: Project Synapse is a hierarchical multi-agent system using LangGraph for autonomous resolution of last-mile delivery disruptions, benchmarked against a new dataset and evaluated using LLM-as-a-Judge with bias mitigation.
tldr_zh: Project Synapse 是一个分层多智能体系统，使用 LangGraph 自动解决最后一英里交付中断问题，并根据新数据集进行基准测试，并使用 LLM-as-a-Judge 进行评估并减轻偏差。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了Synapse项目，一种用于自主解决最后一英里配送中断的新型代理框架。Synapse采用分层多代理架构，其中中央决策监督代理执行战略性任务分解，并将子任务委托给负责战术执行的专业工作代理。该系统利用LangGraph进行编排，以管理复杂和循环的工作流程。为了验证该框架，通过对超过6,000条真实用户评论的定性分析，构建了一个包含30个复杂中断场景的基准数据集。系统性能采用带有明确偏差缓解的LLM-as-a-Judge协议进行评估。

title: Executable Ontologies in Game Development: From Algorithmic Control to Semantic World Modeling
summary: This paper examines the application of Executable Ontologies (EO), implemented through the boldsea framework, to game development. We argue that EO represents a paradigm shift: a transition from algorithmic behavior programming to semantic world modeling, where agent behavior emerges naturally from declarative domain rules rather than being explicitly coded. Using a survival game scenario (Winter Feast), we demonstrate how EO achieves prioritybased task interruption through dataflow conditions rather than explicit preemption logic. Comparison with Behavior Trees (BT) and Goal-Oriented Action Planning (GOAP) reveals that while these approaches model what agents should do, EO models when actions become possible - a fundamental difference that addresses the semantic-process gap in game AI architecture. We discuss integration strategies, debugging advantages inherent to temporal event graphs, and the potential for LLM-driven runtime model generation.
tldr: This paper introduces Executable Ontologies (EO) for game AI, arguing for a shift from algorithmic control to semantic world modeling, demonstrating its advantages over Behavior Trees and GOAP in a survival game scenario, and exploring LLM-driven runtime model generation.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了用于游戏AI的可执行本体（EO），主张从算法控制转向语义世界建模，在生存游戏场景中展示了其相对于行为树和GOAP的优势，并探讨了LLM驱动的运行时模型生成。
summary_zh: 本文探讨了可执行本体（EO）在游戏开发中的应用，该本体通过boldsea框架实现。我们认为EO代表了一种范式转变：从算法行为编程到语义世界建模的转变，代理的行为自然地从声明性领域规则中涌现，而不是被显式编码。我们使用生存游戏场景（Winter Feast）演示了EO如何通过数据流条件，而不是显式抢占逻辑，来实现基于优先级的任务中断。与行为树（BT）和目标导向行为规划（GOAP）的比较表明，虽然这些方法模拟了代理应该做什么，但EO模拟了动作何时成为可能——这是一个根本区别，解决了游戏AI架构中的语义-过程差距。我们讨论了集成策略、时间事件图中固有的调试优势，以及LLM驱动的运行时模型生成的潜力。

title: Zero-Shot Distracted Driver Detection via Vision Language Models with Double Decoupling
summary: Distracted driving is a major cause of traffic collisions, calling for robust and scalable detection methods. Vision-language models (VLMs) enable strong zero-shot image classification, but existing VLM-based distracted driver detectors often underperform in real-world conditions. We identify subject-specific appearance variations (e.g., clothing, age, and gender) as a key bottleneck: VLMs entangle these factors with behavior cues, leading to decisions driven by who the driver is rather than what the driver is doing. To address this, we propose a subject decoupling framework that extracts a driver appearance embedding and removes its influence from the image embedding prior to zero-shot classification, thereby emphasizing distraction-relevant evidence. We further orthogonalize text embeddings via metric projection onto Stiefel manifold to improve separability while staying close to the original semantics. Experiments demonstrate consistent gains over prior baselines, indicating the promise of our approach for practical road-safety applications.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel subject decoupling framework for zero-shot distracted driver detection using vision-language models. It aims to improve performance by removing subject-specific appearance variations and orthogonalizing text embeddings.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的主题解耦框架，用于使用视觉语言模型进行零样本分心驾驶员检测。它旨在通过消除特定于主题的外观变化并正交化文本嵌入来提高性能。
summary_zh: 分心驾驶是交通事故的主要原因，因此需要稳健且可扩展的检测方法。视觉-语言模型（VLMs）能够实现强大的零样本图像分类，但现有的基于VLM的分心驾驶检测器在实际环境中通常表现不佳。我们发现，个体特定的外观变化（例如，服装、年龄和性别）是一个关键瓶颈：VLMs将这些因素与行为线索混淆，导致决策受到驾驶员是谁的影响，而不是驾驶员正在做什么的影响。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种主体解耦框架，该框架提取驾驶员外观嵌入，并在零样本分类之前将其对图像嵌入的影响移除，从而强调与分心相关的证据。我们进一步通过在Stiefel流形上的度量投影来正交化文本嵌入，以提高可分离性，同时保持接近原始语义。实验表明，与先前的基线相比，我们的方法获得了持续的提升，表明我们的方法在实际道路安全应用中具有潜力。

title: Incentivizing Cardiologist-Like Reasoning in MLLMs for Interpretable Echocardiographic Diagnosis
summary: Echocardiographic diagnosis is vital for cardiac screening yet remains challenging. Existing echocardiography foundation models do not effectively capture the relationships between quantitative measurements and clinical manifestations, whereas medical reasoning multimodal large language models (MLLMs) require costly construction of detailed reasoning paths and remain ineffective at directly incorporating such echocardiographic priors into their reasoning. To address these limitations, we propose a novel approach comprising Cardiac Reasoning Template (CRT) and CardiacMind to enhance MLLM's echocardiographic reasoning by introducing cardiologist-like mindset. Specifically, CRT provides stepwise canonical diagnostic procedures for complex cardiac diseases to streamline reasoning path construction without the need for costly case-by-case verification. To incentivize reasoning MLLM under CRT, we develop CardiacMind, a new reinforcement learning scheme with three novel rewards: Procedural Quantity Reward (PQtR), Procedural Quality Reward (PQlR), and Echocardiographic Semantic Reward (ESR). PQtR promotes detailed reasoning; PQlR promotes integration of evidence across views and modalities, while ESR grounds stepwise descriptions in visual content. Our methods show a 48% improvement in multiview echocardiographic diagnosis for 15 complex cardiac diseases and a 5% improvement on CardiacNet-PAH over prior methods. The user study on our method's reasoning outputs shows 93.33% clinician agreement with cardiologist-like reasoning logic. Our code will be available.
tldr: This paper introduces Cardiac Reasoning Template (CRT) and CardiacMind, a reinforcement learning scheme, to improve echocardiographic diagnosis in MLLMs by incentivizing cardiologist-like reasoning, achieving significant improvements in diagnosis accuracy and clinician agreement.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了心脏推理模板 (CRT) 和 CardiacMind，一种强化学习方案，通过激励类似心脏病专家的推理来改进 MLLM 中的超声心动图诊断，在诊断准确性和临床医生一致性方面取得了显著提高。
summary_zh: 超声心动图诊断对于心脏筛查至关重要，但仍具有挑战性。现有的超声心动图基础模型无法有效捕捉定量测量与临床表现之间的关系，而医学推理多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）需要耗费高昂的成本构建详细的推理路径，并且在将此类超声心动图先验知识直接纳入其推理方面仍然无效。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，包括心脏推理模板（CRT）和CardiacMind，通过引入类似心脏病专家的思维方式来增强MLLM的超声心动图推理能力。具体来说，CRT为复杂心脏疾病提供了逐步的规范诊断程序，从而简化了推理路径的构建，而无需进行昂贵的逐例验证。为了激励MLLM在CRT下进行推理，我们开发了CardiacMind，一种新的强化学习方案，包含三个新的奖励：程序性数量奖励（PQtR）、程序性质量奖励（PQlR）和超声心动图语义奖励（ESR）。PQtR促进详细的推理；PQlR促进跨视图和跨模态证据的整合，而ESR将逐步描述与视觉内容相结合。我们的方法在15种复杂心脏疾病的多视图超声心动图诊断中显示出48％的改进，并且在CardiacNet-PAH上的表现比以前的方法提高了5％。对我们方法推理输出的用户研究表明，临床医生对类似于心脏病专家的推理逻辑的认同度达到93.33％。我们的代码将可用。

title: Improving Zero-shot ADL Recognition with Large Language Models through Event-based Context and Confidence
summary: Unobtrusive sensor-based recognition of Activities of Daily Living (ADLs) in smart homes by processing data collected from IoT sensing devices supports applications such as healthcare, safety, and energy management. Recent zero-shot methods based on Large Language Models (LLMs) have the advantage of removing the reliance on labeled ADL sensor data. However, existing approaches rely on time-based segmentation, which is poorly aligned with the contextual reasoning capabilities of LLMs. Moreover, existing approaches lack methods for estimating prediction confidence. This paper proposes to improve zero-shot ADL recognition with event-based segmentation and a novel method for estimating prediction confidence. Our experimental evaluation shows that event-based segmentation consistently outperforms time-based LLM approaches on complex, realistic datasets and surpasses supervised data-driven methods, even with relatively small LLMs (e.g., Gemma 3 27B). The proposed confidence measure effectively distinguishes correct from incorrect predictions.
tldr: This paper improves zero-shot ADL recognition using LLMs by employing event-based segmentation and a novel confidence estimation method, outperforming time-based approaches and supervised methods.
tldr_zh: 本文通过使用基于事件的分割方法和一种新的置信度估计方法，改进了使用LLM的零样本ADL识别，优于基于时间的分割方法和监督学习方法。
summary_zh: 通过处理从物联网传感设备收集的数据，在智能家居中实现对日常活动（ADL）的无干扰传感器识别，可以支持医疗保健、安全和能源管理等应用。近年来，基于大型语言模型（LLM）的零样本方法具有摆脱对标记ADL传感器数据依赖的优势。然而，现有方法依赖于基于时间的分割，这与LLM的上下文推理能力严重不符。此外，现有方法缺乏用于估计预测置信度的方法。本文提出了一种基于事件分割的新方法和一个用于估计预测置信度的新颖方法，以改进零样本ADL识别。我们的实验评估表明，在复杂的、真实的数据集上，基于事件的分割始终优于基于时间的LLM方法，甚至超过了有监督的数据驱动方法，即使使用相对较小的LLM（例如，Gemma 3 27B）。所提出的置信度度量能够有效地区分正确和错误的预测。

title: MobiDiary: Autoregressive Action Captioning with Wearable Devices and Wireless Signals
summary: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) in smart homes is critical for health monitoring and assistive living. While vision-based systems are common, they face privacy concerns and environmental limitations (e.g., occlusion). In this work, we present MobiDiary, a framework that generates natural language descriptions of daily activities directly from heterogeneous physical signals (specifically IMU and Wi-Fi). Unlike conventional approaches that restrict outputs to pre-defined labels, MobiDiary produces expressive, human-readable summaries. To bridge the semantic gap between continuous, noisy physical signals and discrete linguistic descriptions, we propose a unified sensor encoder. Instead of relying on modality-specific engineering, we exploit the shared inductive biases of motion-induced signals--where both inertial and wireless data reflect underlying kinematic dynamics. Specifically, our encoder utilizes a patch-based mechanism to capture local temporal correlations and integrates heterogeneous placement embedding to unify spatial contexts across different sensors. These unified signal tokens are then fed into a Transformer-based decoder, which employs an autoregressive mechanism to generate coherent action descriptions word-by-word. We comprehensively evaluate our approach on multiple public benchmarks (XRF V2, UWash, and WiFiTAD). Experimental results demonstrate that MobiDiary effectively generalizes across modalities, achieving state-of-the-art performance on captioning metrics (e.g., BLEU@4, CIDEr, RMC) and outperforming specialized baselines in continuous action understanding.
tldr: The paper introduces MobiDiary, a framework that generates natural language descriptions of daily activities from wearable sensor data (IMU and Wi-Fi) using a unified sensor encoder and a Transformer-based autoregressive decoder, achieving state-of-the-art results on action captioning metrics.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了MobiDiary，一个利用可穿戴传感器数据（IMU和Wi-Fi）生成日常活动自然语言描述的框架。该框架采用统一的传感器编码器和一个基于Transformer的自回归解码器，并在动作描述指标上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 智能家居中的人体活动识别 (HAR) 对于健康监测和辅助生活至关重要。虽然基于视觉的系统很常见，但它们面临隐私问题和环境限制（例如，遮挡）。 在这项工作中，我们提出了 MobiDiary，一个直接从异构物理信号（特别是 IMU 和 Wi-Fi）生成日常活动自然语言描述的框架。 与将输出限制为预定义标签的传统方法不同，MobiDiary 生成富有表现力的、人类可读的摘要。 为了弥合连续、嘈杂的物理信号和离散的语言描述之间的语义差距，我们提出了一种统一的传感器编码器。 我们没有依赖于特定于模态的工程设计，而是利用了运动诱导信号的共享归纳偏差 —— 惯性和无线数据都反映了潜在的运动学动态。 具体来说，我们的编码器利用基于补丁的机制来捕获局部时间相关性，并集成异构位置嵌入来统一不同传感器之间的空间情境。 这些统一的信号标记然后被馈送到基于 Transformer 的解码器，该解码器采用自回归机制来逐字生成连贯的动作描述。 我们在多个公共基准（XRF V2、UWash 和 WiFiTAD）上全面评估了我们的方法。 实验结果表明，MobiDiary 可以有效地跨模态泛化，在字幕指标（例如，BLEU@4、CIDEr、RMC）上实现了最先进的性能，并且在连续动作理解方面优于专门的基线方法。

title: CogniMap3D: Cognitive 3D Mapping and Rapid Retrieval
summary: We present CogniMap3D, a bioinspired framework for dynamic 3D scene understanding and reconstruction that emulates human cognitive processes. Our approach maintains a persistent memory bank of static scenes, enabling efficient spatial knowledge storage and rapid retrieval. CogniMap3D integrates three core capabilities: a multi-stage motion cue framework for identifying dynamic objects, a cognitive mapping system for storing, recalling, and updating static scenes across multiple visits, and a factor graph optimization strategy for refining camera poses. Given an image stream, our model identifies dynamic regions through motion cues with depth and camera pose priors, then matches static elements against its memory bank. When revisiting familiar locations, CogniMap3D retrieves stored scenes, relocates cameras, and updates memory with new observations. Evaluations on video depth estimation, camera pose reconstruction, and 3D mapping tasks demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance, while effectively supporting continuous scene understanding across extended sequences and multiple visits.
tldr: CogniMap3D is a bioinspired 3D mapping framework with dynamic object identification, cognitive scene mapping, and factor graph optimization for continuous scene understanding and reconstruction across multiple visits, demonstrating state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: CogniMap3D是一个受生物学启发的3D地图框架，它结合了动态物体识别、认知场景地图构建和因子图优化，以实现跨多次访问的连续场景理解和重建，并展示了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出CogniMap3D，一个受生物启发的动态3D场景理解和重建框架，它模拟人类认知过程。我们的方法维护一个静态场景的持久记忆库，从而实现高效的空间知识存储和快速检索。CogniMap3D集成了三个核心能力：一个用于识别动态对象的多阶段运动线索框架，一个用于跨多次访问存储、调用和更新静态场景的认知地图系统，以及一个用于优化相机姿态的因子图优化策略。给定一个图像流，我们的模型通过具有深度和相机姿态先验的运动线索识别动态区域，然后将静态元素与其记忆库进行匹配。当重访熟悉的位置时，CogniMap3D检索存储的场景，重新定位相机，并用新的观察结果更新记忆。在视频深度估计、相机姿态重建和3D映射任务上的评估表明，其性能达到了最先进的水平，同时有效地支持跨越扩展序列和多次访问的连续场景理解。

title: From Prompts to Deployment: Auto-Curated Domain-Specific Dataset Generation via Diffusion Models
summary: In this paper, we present an automated pipeline for generating domain-specific synthetic datasets with diffusion models, addressing the distribution shift between pre-trained models and real-world deployment environments. Our three-stage framework first synthesizes target objects within domain-specific backgrounds through controlled inpainting. The generated outputs are then validated via a multi-modal assessment that integrates object detection, aesthetic scoring, and vision-language alignment. Finally, a user-preference classifier is employed to capture subjective selection criteria. This pipeline enables the efficient construction of high-quality, deployable datasets while reducing reliance on extensive real-world data collection.
tldr: This paper introduces an automated pipeline using diffusion models for generating high-quality, domain-specific synthetic datasets by synthesizing objects, validating them using multi-modal assessment and user-preference classification, aiming to reduce reliance on real-world data.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种自动化流程，使用扩散模型生成高质量的、特定领域的合成数据集。该流程通过合成物体、使用多模态评估和用户偏好分类进行验证，旨在减少对真实世界数据的依赖。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种利用扩散模型生成特定领域合成数据集的自动化流程，旨在解决预训练模型与真实部署环境之间的分布偏移问题。我们的三阶段框架首先通过可控的图像修复技术，在特定领域的背景中合成目标对象。随后，通过整合目标检测、美学评分和视觉-语言对齐的多模态评估来验证生成的输出。最后，使用用户偏好分类器来捕捉主观选择标准。该流程能够高效构建高质量、可部署的数据集，同时减少对大规模真实数据收集的依赖。

title: Model-Agnostic Solutions for Deep Reinforcement Learning in Non-Ergodic Contexts
summary: Reinforcement Learning (RL) remains a central optimisation framework in machine learning. Although RL agents can converge to optimal solutions, the definition of ``optimality'' depends on the environment's statistical properties. The Bellman equation, central to most RL algorithms, is formulated in terms of expected values of future rewards. However, when ergodicity is broken, long-term outcomes depend on the specific trajectory rather than on the ensemble average. In such settings, the ensemble average diverges from the time-average growth experienced by individual agents, with expected-value formulations yielding systematically suboptimal policies. Prior studies demonstrated that traditional RL architectures fail to recover the true optimum in non-ergodic environments. We extend this analysis to deep RL implementations and show that these, too, produce suboptimal policies under non-ergodic dynamics. Introducing explicit time dependence into the learning process can correct this limitation. By allowing the network's function approximation to incorporate temporal information, the agent can estimate value functions consistent with the process's intrinsic growth rate. This improvement does not require altering the environmental feedback, such as reward transformations or modified objective functions, but arises naturally from the agent's exposure to temporal trajectories. Our results contribute to the growing body of research on reinforcement learning methods for non-ergodic systems.
tldr: This paper demonstrates that deep reinforcement learning algorithms produce suboptimal policies in non-ergodic environments and proposes a model-agnostic solution by incorporating temporal information into the learning process.
tldr_zh: 本文证明了深度强化学习算法在非遍历环境中产生次优策略，并提出了一种与模型无关的解决方案，通过将时间信息融入学习过程。
summary_zh: 强化学习(RL)仍然是机器学习中的一个核心优化框架。尽管强化学习智能体可以收敛到最优解，但“最优性”的定义取决于环境的统计特性。贝尔曼方程是大多数强化学习算法的核心，它以未来奖励的期望值形式构建。然而，当遍历性被打破时，长期结果取决于特定的轨迹，而不是系综平均。在这种情况下，系综平均与个体智能体经历的时间平均增长发散，期望值公式会产生系统性的次优策略。先前的研究表明，传统的强化学习架构无法在非遍历环境中恢复真正的最优解。我们将此分析扩展到深度强化学习实现，并表明这些实现也在非遍历动力学下产生次优策略。将显式的时间依赖性引入学习过程可以纠正这一限制。通过允许网络的功能逼近包含时间信息，智能体可以估计与过程内在增长率一致的价值函数。这种改进不需要改变环境反馈，例如奖励转换或修改目标函数，而是自然地源于智能体对时间轨迹的暴露。我们的研究结果为非遍历系统强化学习方法的研究做出了贡献。

title: VBO-MI: A Fully Gradient-Based Bayesian Optimization Framework Using Variational Mutual Information Estimation
summary: Many real-world tasks require optimizing expensive black-box functions accessible only through noisy evaluations, a setting commonly addressed with Bayesian optimization (BO). While Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) have recently emerged as scalable alternatives to Gaussian Processes (GPs), traditional BNN-BO frameworks remain burdened by expensive posterior sampling and acquisition function optimization. In this work, we propose {VBO-MI} (Variational Bayesian Optimization with Mutual Information), a fully gradient-based BO framework that leverages recent advances in variational mutual information estimation. To enable end-to-end gradient flow, we employ an actor-critic architecture consisting of an {action-net} to navigate the input space and a {variational critic} to estimate information gain. This formulation effectively eliminates the traditional inner-loop acquisition optimization bottleneck, achieving up to a {$10^2 \times$ reduction in FLOPs} compared to BNN-BO baselines. We evaluate our method on a diverse suite of benchmarks, including high-dimensional synthetic functions and complex real-world tasks such as PDE optimization, the Lunar Lander control problem, and categorical Pest Control. Our experiments demonstrate that VBO-MI consistently provides the same or superior optimization performance and computational scalability over the baselines.
tldr: The paper introduces VBO-MI, a novel Bayesian optimization framework utilizing variational mutual information estimation and a fully gradient-based approach to eliminate the acquisition function optimization bottleneck, achieving significant FLOPs reduction and competitive performance on various benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 VBO-MI，一种新颖的贝叶斯优化框架，利用变分互信息估计和全梯度方法来消除采集函数优化瓶颈，在各种基准测试中实现了显著的 FLOPs 减少和有竞争力的性能。
summary_zh: 许多现实世界的任务需要优化昂贵的黑盒函数，这些函数只能通过带有噪声的评估来访问，这是一种通常使用贝叶斯优化（BO）解决的场景。虽然贝叶斯神经网络（BNN）最近已经成为高斯过程（GP）的可扩展替代方案，但传统的BNN-BO框架仍然受到昂贵的后验采样和采集函数优化问题的困扰。在这项工作中，我们提出了{VBO-MI}（基于互信息的变分贝叶斯优化），一个完全基于梯度的BO框架，它利用了最近在变分互信息估计方面的进展。为了实现端到端的梯度流，我们采用了一种由{动作网络}（用于导航输入空间）和{变分评论家}（用于估计信息增益）组成的Actor-Critic架构。这种公式有效消除了传统的内循环采集函数优化瓶颈，与BNN-BO基线相比，实现了高达{$10^2 \times$ FLOPs的降低}。我们在一组多样化的基准上评估了我们的方法，包括高维合成函数和复杂的真实世界任务，例如PDE优化、月球着陆器控制问题和分类害虫控制。我们的实验表明，与基线相比，VBO-MI始终提供相同或更优越的优化性能和计算可扩展性。

title: Reverse Flow Matching: A Unified Framework for Online Reinforcement Learning with Diffusion and Flow Policies
summary: Diffusion and flow policies are gaining prominence in online reinforcement learning (RL) due to their expressive power, yet training them efficiently remains a critical challenge. A fundamental difficulty in online RL is the lack of direct samples from the target distribution; instead, the target is an unnormalized Boltzmann distribution defined by the Q-function. To address this, two seemingly distinct families of methods have been proposed for diffusion policies: a noise-expectation family, which utilizes a weighted average of noise as the training target, and a gradient-expectation family, which employs a weighted average of Q-function gradients. Yet, it remains unclear how these objectives relate formally or if they can be synthesized into a more general formulation. In this paper, we propose a unified framework, reverse flow matching (RFM), which rigorously addresses the problem of training diffusion and flow models without direct target samples. By adopting a reverse inferential perspective, we formulate the training target as a posterior mean estimation problem given an intermediate noisy sample. Crucially, we introduce Langevin Stein operators to construct zero-mean control variates, deriving a general class of estimators that effectively reduce importance sampling variance. We show that existing noise-expectation and gradient-expectation methods are two specific instances within this broader class. This unified view yields two key advancements: it extends the capability of targeting Boltzmann distributions from diffusion to flow policies, and enables the principled combination of Q-value and Q-gradient information to derive an optimal, minimum-variance estimator, thereby improving training efficiency and stability. We instantiate RFM to train a flow policy in online RL, and demonstrate improved performance on continuous-control benchmarks compared to diffusion policy baselines.
tldr: This paper introduces Reverse Flow Matching (RFM), a unified framework for training diffusion and flow policies in online RL by framing the training target as a posterior mean estimation problem, leading to improved performance and stability.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了反向流匹配 (RFM)，这是一个统一的框架，通过将训练目标定义为后验均值估计问题，用于训练在线强化学习中的扩散和流策略，从而提高性能和稳定性。
summary_zh: 扩散和流策略因其强大的表达能力在在线强化学习(RL)中越来越受到重视，但如何高效地训练它们仍然是一个关键挑战。在线RL的一个根本性困难是缺乏来自目标分布的直接样本；相反，目标是一个由Q函数定义的未归一化的玻尔兹曼分布。为了解决这个问题，针对扩散策略提出了两个看似不同的方法族：噪声期望族，它利用噪声的加权平均作为训练目标；以及梯度期望族，它采用Q函数梯度的加权平均。然而，这些目标在形式上如何关联，或者它们是否可以综合成一个更通用的公式，仍然不清楚。在本文中，我们提出了一个统一的框架，即逆向流匹配(RFM)，它严格地解决了在没有直接目标样本的情况下训练扩散和流模型的问题。通过采用逆向推断的视角，我们将训练目标构建为给定中间噪声样本的后验均值估计问题。至关重要的是，我们引入了朗之万斯坦算子来构建零均值控制变量，从而推导出一种通用估计器，能够有效降低重要性采样的方差。我们证明了现有的噪声期望和梯度期望方法是这个更广泛类别中的两个特定实例。这种统一的观点带来了两个关键的进步：它将针对玻尔兹曼分布的能力从扩散策略扩展到流策略，并实现了Q值和Q梯度信息的有原则的结合，从而推导出最优的、最小方差的估计器，进而提高了训练效率和稳定性。我们实例化了RFM，以在线RL中训练流策略，并在连续控制基准测试中证明了与扩散策略基线相比，性能有所提高。

title: Structure Detection for Contextual Reinforcement Learning
summary: Contextual Reinforcement Learning (CRL) tackles the problem of solving a set of related Contextual Markov Decision Processes (CMDPs) that vary across different context variables. Traditional approaches--independent training and multi-task learning--struggle with either excessive computational costs or negative transfer. A recently proposed multi-policy approach, Model-Based Transfer Learning (MBTL), has demonstrated effectiveness by strategically selecting a few tasks to train and zero-shot transfer. However, CMDPs encompass a wide range of problems, exhibiting structural properties that vary from problem to problem. As such, different task selection strategies are suitable for different CMDPs. In this work, we introduce Structure Detection MBTL (SD-MBTL), a generic framework that dynamically identifies the underlying generalization structure of CMDP and selects an appropriate MBTL algorithm. For instance, we observe Mountain structure in which generalization performance degrades from the training performance of the target task as the context difference increases. We thus propose M/GP-MBTL, which detects the structure and adaptively switches between a Gaussian Process-based approach and a clustering-based approach. Extensive experiments on synthetic data and CRL benchmarks--covering continuous control, traffic control, and agricultural management--show that M/GP-MBTL surpasses the strongest prior method by 12.49% on the aggregated metric. These results highlight the promise of online structure detection for guiding source task selection in complex CRL environments.
tldr: This paper proposes Structure Detection MBTL (SD-MBTL), a framework for contextual reinforcement learning that dynamically identifies the underlying generalization structure of CMDPs and selects the appropriate MBTL algorithm, demonstrating improvements over existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种结构检测MBTL (SD-MBTL)框架，用于上下文强化学习，该框架能够动态识别CMDPs的底层泛化结构，并选择合适的MBTL算法，实验结果显示其优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 情境强化学习（CRL）旨在解决一组相关的、随不同的情境变量而变化的情境马尔可夫决策过程（CMDP）的问题。传统方法——独立训练和多任务学习——要么面临过高的计算成本，要么面临负迁移。最近提出的一种多策略方法，即基于模型的迁移学习（MBTL），通过策略性地选择少量任务进行训练并进行零样本迁移，展现出了有效性。然而，CMDP涵盖了广泛的问题，表现出因问题而异的结构属性。因此，不同的任务选择策略适用于不同的CMDP。在这项工作中，我们引入了结构检测MBTL（SD-MBTL），这是一种通用框架，能够动态识别CMDP的底层泛化结构，并选择合适的MBTL算法。例如，我们观察到一种“山脉”结构，其中泛化性能随着情境差异的增加而从目标任务的训练性能下降。因此，我们提出了M/GP-MBTL，它可以检测结构并自适应地在基于高斯过程的方法和基于聚类的方法之间切换。在合成数据和CRL基准测试（涵盖连续控制、交通控制和农业管理）上进行的大量实验表明，M/GP-MBTL在综合指标上超越了最强的现有方法12.49%。这些结果突显了在线结构检测在引导复杂CRL环境中源任务选择方面的潜力。

title: Real-Time Localization Framework for Autonomous Basketball Robots
summary: Localization is a fundamental capability for autonomous robots, enabling them to operate effectively in dynamic environments. In Robocon 2025, accurate and reliable localization is crucial for improving shooting precision, avoiding collisions with other robots, and navigating the competition field efficiently. In this paper, we propose a hybrid localization algorithm that integrates classical techniques with learning based methods that rely solely on visual data from the court's floor to achieve self-localization on the basketball field.
tldr: This paper introduces a hybrid localization algorithm for autonomous basketball robots, combining classical and learning-based methods using visual data from the court.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自主篮球机器人的混合定位算法，该算法结合了经典方法和基于学习的方法，利用球场地板的视觉数据。
summary_zh: 定位是自主机器人的基本能力，使其能够在动态环境中有效运行。在2025年Robocon比赛中，准确且可靠的定位对于提高射击精度、避免与其他机器人碰撞以及高效地导航比赛场地至关重要。本文提出了一种混合定位算法，该算法集成了经典技术和基于学习的方法，该方法仅依赖于球场地板的视觉数据来实现自主定位。

title: AUV Trajectory Learning for Underwater Acoustic Energy Transfer and Age Minimization
summary: Internet of underwater things (IoUT) is increasingly gathering attention with the aim of monitoring sea life and deep ocean environment, underwater surveillance as well as maintenance of underwater installments. However, conventional IoUT devices, reliant on battery power, face limitations in lifespan and pose environmental hazards upon disposal. This paper introduces a sustainable approach for simultaneous information uplink from the IoUT devices and acoustic energy transfer (AET) to the devices via an autonomous underwater vehicle (AUV), potentially enabling them to operate indefinitely. To tackle the time-sensitivity, we adopt age of information (AoI), and Jain's fairness index. We develop two deep-reinforcement learning (DRL) algorithms, offering a high-complexity, high-performance frequency division duplex (FDD) solution and a low-complexity, medium-performance time division duplex (TDD) approach. The results elucidate that the proposed FDD and TDD solutions significantly reduce the average AoI and boost the harvested energy as well as data collection fairness compared to baseline approaches.
tldr: This paper presents deep reinforcement learning algorithms for autonomous underwater vehicles to optimize acoustic energy transfer and data collection from underwater IoT devices, minimizing age of information and maximizing fairness.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于自主水下航行器的深度强化学习算法，以优化水声能量传输和水下物联网设备的数据采集，从而最小化信息年龄并最大化公平性。
summary_zh: 水下物联网(IoUT)正日益受到关注，其目标是监测海洋生物和深海环境、水下监控以及水下设施的维护。然而，传统的IoUT设备依赖电池供电，面临寿命限制，且废弃时会造成环境危害。本文介绍了一种可持续的方法，通过自主水下航行器(AUV)同时实现IoUT设备的信息上行链路和向设备的声能传输(AET)，从而有可能使其无限期运行。为了解决时间敏感性问题，我们采用了信息年龄(AoI)和贾恩公平性指数。我们开发了两种深度强化学习(DRL)算法，分别提供了一种高复杂度、高性能的频分双工(FDD)解决方案和一种低复杂度、中等性能的时分双工(TDD)方法。结果表明，与基线方法相比，所提出的FDD和TDD解决方案显著降低了平均AoI，并提高了能量收集和数据收集的公平性。

title: Spiking Neural-Invariant Kalman Fusion for Accurate Localization Using Low-Cost IMUs
summary: Low-cost inertial measurement units (IMUs) are widely utilized in mobile robot localization due to their affordability and ease of integration. However, their complex, nonlinear, and time-varying noise characteristics often lead to significant degradation in localization accuracy when applied directly for dead reckoning. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel brain-inspired state estimation framework that combines a spiking neural network (SNN) with an invariant extended Kalman filter (InEKF). The SNN is designed to extract motion-related features from long sequences of IMU data affected by substantial random noise and is trained via a surrogate gradient descent algorithm to enable dynamic adaptation of the covariance noise parameter within the InEKF. By fusing the SNN output with raw IMU measurements, the proposed method enhances the robustness and accuracy of pose estimation. Extensive experiments conducted on the KITTI dataset and real-world data collected using a mobile robot equipped with a low-cost IMU demonstrate that the proposed approach outperforms state-of-the-art methods in localization accuracy and exhibits strong robustness to sensor noise, highlighting its potential for real-world mobile robot applications.
tldr: This paper presents a novel brain-inspired state estimation framework combining a spiking neural network (SNN) with an invariant extended Kalman filter (InEKF) to improve localization accuracy using low-cost IMUs.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的受大脑启发的姿态估计框架，该框架结合了脉冲神经网络（SNN）和不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（InEKF），以提高使用低成本IMU的定位精度。
summary_zh: 低成本惯性测量单元（IMU）因其经济性和易于集成而被广泛应用于移动机器人定位。然而，当直接应用于航位推算时，其复杂、非线性且时变的噪声特性常常导致定位精度显著下降。为了克服这一局限性，我们提出了一种新型的受大脑启发的姿态估计框架，该框架结合了脉冲神经网络（SNN）和不变扩展卡尔曼滤波器（InEKF）。该SNN旨在从受大量随机噪声影响的IMU数据长序列中提取与运动相关的特征，并通过替代梯度下降算法进行训练，以实现InEKF内部协方差噪声参数的动态调整。通过融合SNN输出与原始IMU测量值，所提出的方法增强了姿态估计的鲁棒性和准确性。在KITTI数据集以及使用配备低成本IMU的移动机器人收集的真实世界数据上进行的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在定位精度方面优于最先进的方法，并且对传感器噪声表现出强大的鲁棒性，凸显了其在真实世界移动机器人应用中的潜力。

title: Efficient Incremental SLAM via Information-Guided and Selective Optimization
summary: We present an efficient incremental SLAM back-end that achieves the accuracy of full batch optimization while substantially reducing computational cost. The proposed approach combines two complementary ideas: information-guided gating (IGG) and selective partial optimization (SPO). IGG employs an information-theoretic criterion based on the log-determinant of the information matrix to quantify the contribution of new measurements, triggering global optimization only when a significant information gain is observed. This avoids unnecessary relinearization and factorization when incoming data provide little additional information. SPO executes multi-iteration Gauss-Newton (GN) updates but restricts each iteration to the subset of variables most affected by the new measurements, dynamically refining this active set until convergence. Together, these mechanisms retain all measurements to preserve global consistency while focusing computation on parts of the graph where it yields the greatest benefit. We provide theoretical analysis showing that the proposed approach maintains the convergence guarantees of full GN. Extensive experiments on benchmark SLAM datasets show that our approach consistently matches the estimation accuracy of batch solvers, while achieving significant computational savings compared to conventional incremental approaches. The results indicate that the proposed approach offers a principled balance between accuracy and efficiency, making it a robust and scalable solution for real-time operation in dynamic data-rich environments.
tldr: This paper introduces an efficient incremental SLAM back-end (IGG+SPO) that aims to achieve full batch optimization accuracy with reduced computational cost, showing strong performance on benchmark datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种高效的增量SLAM后端（IGG+SPO），旨在以降低的计算成本实现全批量优化的精度，并在基准数据集上表现出强大的性能。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种高效的增量式SLAM后端，它在实现全批量优化精度的同时，显著降低了计算成本。所提出的方法结合了两个互补的思想：信息引导门控（IGG）和选择性偏优化（SPO）。IGG采用基于信息矩阵的对数行列式的，信息论准则来量化新测量的贡献，仅当观察到显著的信息增益时才触发全局优化。这避免了传入数据提供少量额外信息时不必要的重新线性化和分解。 SPO执行多迭代高斯-牛顿（GN）更新，但将每次迭代限制于受新测量影响最大的变量子集，动态地完善此活跃集直到收敛。这些机制共同保留了所有测量以保持全局一致性，同时将计算集中在图中最能产生益处的部分。我们提供了理论分析表明，所提出的方法保持了完整GN的收敛保证。在基准SLAM数据集上的大量实验表明，我们的方法始终与批量求解器的估计精度相匹配，同时与传统的增量方法相比，实现了显著的计算节省。结果表明，所提出的方法在精度和效率之间提供了合理的平衡，使其成为动态数据丰富环境中实时操作的强大且可扩展的解决方案。

title: SPARK: Scalable Real-Time Point Cloud Aggregation with Multi-View Self-Calibration
summary: Real-time multi-camera 3D reconstruction is crucial for 3D perception, immersive interaction, and robotics. Existing methods struggle with multi-view fusion, camera extrinsic uncertainty, and scalability for large camera setups. We propose SPARK, a self-calibrating real-time multi-camera point cloud reconstruction framework that jointly handles point cloud fusion and extrinsic uncertainty. SPARK consists of: (1) a geometry-aware online extrinsic estimation module leveraging multi-view priors and enforcing cross-view and temporal consistency for stable self-calibration, and (2) a confidence-driven point cloud fusion strategy modeling depth reliability and visibility at pixel and point levels to suppress noise and view-dependent inconsistencies. By performing frame-wise fusion without accumulation, SPARK produces stable point clouds in dynamic scenes while scaling linearly with the number of cameras. Extensive experiments on real-world multi-camera systems show that SPARK outperforms existing approaches in extrinsic accuracy, geometric consistency, temporal stability, and real-time performance, demonstrating its effectiveness and scalability for large-scale multi-camera 3D reconstruction.
tldr: SPARK is a novel self-calibrating real-time multi-camera point cloud reconstruction framework that addresses extrinsic uncertainty and enables scalable 3D reconstruction in dynamic environments.
tldr_zh: SPARK 是一个新颖的自校准实时多摄像头点云重建框架，它解决了外参不确定性问题，并可在动态环境中实现可扩展的3D重建。
summary_zh: 实时多摄像头3D重建对于3D感知、沉浸式交互和机器人技术至关重要。现有方法难以应对多视角融合、相机外参不确定性以及大规模摄像头设置的扩展性。我们提出SPARK，一种自校准的实时多摄像头点云重建框架，可联合处理点云融合和外参不确定性。SPARK包含：（1）一个几何感知在线外参估计模块，利用多视角先验并强制执行跨视角和时间一致性，以实现稳定的自校准；以及（2）一种置信度驱动的点云融合策略，对像素和点级别的深度可靠性和可见性进行建模，以抑制噪声和视角相关的伪影。通过执行无累积的逐帧融合，SPARK在动态场景中生成稳定的点云，同时随摄像头数量线性扩展。在真实世界多摄像头系统上的大量实验表明，SPARK在内外参精度、几何一致性、时间稳定性和实时性能方面优于现有方法，证明了其在大规模多摄像头3D重建中的有效性和可扩展性。

title: Towards Cross-Platform Generalization: Domain Adaptive 3D Detection with Augmentation and Pseudo-Labeling
summary: This technical report represents the award-winning solution to the Cross-platform 3D Object Detection task in the RoboSense2025 Challenge. Our approach is built upon PVRCNN++, an efficient 3D object detection framework that effectively integrates point-based and voxel-based features. On top of this foundation, we improve cross-platform generalization by narrowing domain gaps through tailored data augmentation and a self-training strategy with pseudo-labels. These enhancements enabled our approach to secure the 3rd place in the challenge, achieving a 3D AP of 62.67% for the Car category on the phase-1 target domain, and 58.76% and 49.81% for Car and Pedestrian categories respectively on the phase-2 target domain.
tldr: The paper presents a domain adaptive 3D object detection approach using data augmentation and pseudo-labeling to improve cross-platform generalization, achieving competitive results in the RoboSense2025 Challenge.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种使用数据增强和伪标签的领域自适应3D目标检测方法，以提高跨平台泛化能力，并在RoboSense2025挑战赛中取得了不错的成绩。
summary_zh: 本技术报告描述了RoboSense2025挑战赛中跨平台3D目标检测任务的获奖解决方案。我们的方法基于PVRCNN++——一个高效的3D目标检测框架，它有效地整合了基于点和基于体素的特征。在此基础上，我们通过定制的数据增强和利用伪标签的自训练策略来缩小域差距，从而提高跨平台泛化能力。这些改进使我们的方法在该挑战赛中获得第三名，在第一阶段目标域的汽车类别上实现了62.67%的3D AP，在第二阶段目标域的汽车和行人类别上分别实现了58.76%和49.81%的3D AP。

title: 3DGS-Drag: Dragging Gaussians for Intuitive Point-Based 3D Editing
summary: The transformative potential of 3D content creation has been progressively unlocked through advancements in generative models. Recently, intuitive drag editing with geometric changes has attracted significant attention in 2D editing yet remains challenging for 3D scenes. In this paper, we introduce 3DGS-Drag -- a point-based 3D editing framework that provides efficient, intuitive drag manipulation of real 3D scenes. Our approach bridges the gap between deformation-based and 2D-editing-based 3D editing methods, addressing their limitations to geometry-related content editing. We leverage two key innovations: deformation guidance utilizing 3D Gaussian Splatting for consistent geometric modifications and diffusion guidance for content correction and visual quality enhancement. A progressive editing strategy further supports aggressive 3D drag edits. Our method enables a wide range of edits, including motion change, shape adjustment, inpainting, and content extension. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of 3DGS-Drag in various scenes, achieving state-of-the-art performance in geometry-related 3D content editing. Notably, the editing is efficient, taking 10 to 20 minutes on a single RTX 4090 GPU.
tldr: The paper introduces 3DGS-Drag, a novel framework for efficient and intuitive 3D scene editing using 3D Gaussian Splatting and diffusion guidance, enabling various geometry-related edits with high performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 3DGS-Drag，一种使用 3D 高斯溅射和扩散引导进行高效直观的 3D 场景编辑的新框架，能够以高性能实现各种几何相关的编辑。
summary_zh: 3D内容创建的变革潜力正在通过生成模型的进步逐步释放。 近期，具备几何变化的直观拖拽编辑在2D编辑中引起了极大的关注，但对于3D场景而言仍然具有挑战性。 在本文中，我们介绍了3DGS-Drag -- 一种基于点的3D编辑框架，为真实3D场景提供高效、直观的拖拽操作。 我们的方法弥合了基于变形和基于2D编辑的3D编辑方法之间的差距，解决了它们在几何相关内容编辑方面的局限性。 我们利用了两项关键创新：利用3D高斯溅射进行一致几何修改的变形引导，以及用于内容校正和视觉质量增强的扩散引导。一种渐进式编辑策略进一步支持激进的3D拖拽编辑。 我们的方法支持广泛的编辑，包括运动改变、形状调整、图像修复和内容扩展。实验结果表明，3DGS-Drag在各种场景中的有效性，在几何相关的3D内容编辑方面达到了最先进的性能。 值得注意的是，该编辑是高效的，在单个RTX 4090 GPU上需要10到20分钟。

title: Vision-Language Model for Accurate Crater Detection
summary: The European Space Agency (ESA), driven by its ambitions on planned lunar missions with the Argonaut lander, has a profound interest in reliable crater detection, since craters pose a risk to safe lunar landings. This task is usually addressed with automated crater detection algorithms (CDA) based on deep learning techniques. It is non-trivial due to the vast amount of craters of various sizes and shapes, as well as challenging conditions such as varying illumination and rugged terrain. Therefore, we propose a deep-learning CDA based on the OWLv2 model, which is built on a Vision Transformer, that has proven highly effective in various computer vision tasks. For fine-tuning, we utilize a manually labeled dataset fom the IMPACT project, that provides crater annotations on high-resolution Lunar Reconnaissance Orbiter Camera Calibrated Data Record images. We insert trainable parameters using a parameter-efficient fine-tuning strategy with Low-Rank Adaptation, and optimize a combined loss function consisting of Complete Intersection over Union (CIoU) for localization and a contrastive loss for classification. We achieve satisfactory visual results, along with a maximum recall of 94.0% and a maximum precision of 73.1% on a test dataset from IMPACT. Our method achieves reliable crater detection across challenging lunar imaging conditions, paving the way for robust crater analysis in future lunar exploration.
tldr: This paper presents a vision-language model (OWLv2) fine-tuned with Low-Rank Adaptation for accurate lunar crater detection, achieving high recall and precision on a challenging dataset. The method contributes to safer lunar landings.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种视觉-语言模型（OWLv2），通过低秩自适应进行微调，以实现精确的月球陨石坑检测，并在具有挑战性的数据集上实现了较高的召回率和精确率。该方法有助于更安全的月球着陆。
summary_zh: 欧洲航天局（ESA）受其“阿尔戈英雄”号着陆器计划月球任务雄心的驱动，对可靠的陨石坑检测有着深刻的需求，因为陨石坑对安全的月球着陆构成风险。这项任务通常由基于深度学习技术的自动陨石坑检测算法（CDA）来完成。由于大量大小和形状各异的陨石坑，以及诸如变化的照明和崎岖地形等具有挑战性的条件，这项任务并非易事。 因此，我们提出了一种基于OWLv2模型的深度学习CDA，该模型构建于Vision Transformer之上，后者已被证明在各种计算机视觉任务中非常有效。为了进行微调，我们利用了IMPACT项目中的手动标记数据集，该数据集提供了高分辨率月球勘测轨道飞行器相机校准数据记录图像上的陨石坑注释。我们使用带有低秩适应（Low-Rank Adaptation）的参数高效微调策略插入可训练参数，并优化由用于定位的完整交并比（CIoU）和用于分类的对比损失组成的组合损失函数。在来自IMPACT的测试数据集上，我们获得了令人满意的视觉结果，以及94.0%的最大召回率和73.1%的最大精度。 我们的方法在具有挑战性的月球成像条件下实现了可靠的陨石坑检测，为未来月球勘探中稳健的陨石坑分析铺平了道路。

title: Simplifying ROS2 controllers with a modular architecture for robot-agnostic reference generation
summary: This paper introduces a novel modular architecture for ROS2 that decouples the logic required to acquire, validate, and interpolate references from the control laws that track them. The design includes a dedicated component, named Reference Generator, that receives references, in the form of either single points or trajectories, from external nodes (e.g., planners), and writes single-point references at the controller's sampling period via the existing ros2_control chaining mechanism to downstream controllers. This separation removes duplicated reference-handling code from controllers and improves reusability across robot platforms. We implement two reference generators: one for handling joint-space references and one for Cartesian references, along with a set of new controllers (PD with gravity compensation, Cartesian pose, and admittance controllers) and validate the approach on simulated and real Universal Robots and Franka Emika manipulators. Results show that (i) references are tracked reliably in all tested scenarios, (ii) reference generators reduce duplicated reference-handling code across chained controllers to favor the construction and reuse of complex controller pipelines, and (iii) controller implementations remain focused only on control laws.
tldr: The paper introduces a modular ROS2 architecture using Reference Generators to simplify controller design and improve code reusability across different robot platforms by decoupling reference handling from control laws.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种模块化的ROS2架构，使用参考生成器来简化控制器设计，并通过将参考处理与控制律分离，提高了不同机器人平台之间的代码可重用性。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于ROS2的新型模块化架构，该架构将获取、验证和插值参考所需的逻辑与跟踪这些参考的控制律解耦。该设计包括一个专用的组件，名为参考生成器，其从外部节点（例如，规划器）接收参考，参考的形式可以是单点或轨迹，并通过现有的ros2_control链接机制，以控制器的采样周期将单点参考写入下游控制器。 这种分离消除了控制器中重复的参考处理代码，并提高了在不同机器人平台上的可重用性。 我们实现了两个参考生成器：一个用于处理关节空间参考，另一个用于处理笛卡尔参考，同时还实现了一组新的控制器（带有重力补偿的PD控制器、笛卡尔位姿控制器和导纳控制器），并在模拟的和真实的Universal Robots和Franka Emika机械臂上验证了该方法。 结果表明：（i）在所有测试场景中，参考都被可靠地跟踪；（ii）参考生成器减少了链式控制器中重复的参考处理代码，有利于构建和重用复杂的控制器流水线；（iii）控制器的实现仍然只关注控制律。

title: A brain-inspired information fusion method for enhancing robot GPS outages navigation
summary: Low-cost inertial navigation systems (INS) are prone to sensor biases and measurement noise, which lead to rapid degradation of navigation accuracy during global positioning system (GPS) outages. To address this challenge and improve positioning continuity in GPS-denied environments, this paper proposes a brain-inspired GPS/INS fusion network (BGFN) based on spiking neural networks (SNNs). The BGFN architecture integrates a spiking Transformer with a spiking encoder to simultaneously extract spatial features from inertial measurement unit (IMU) signals and capture their temporal dynamics. By modeling the relationship between vehicle attitude, specific force, angular rate, and GPS-derived position increments, the network leverages both current and historical IMU data to estimate vehicle motion. The effectiveness of the proposed method is evaluated through real-world field tests and experiments on public datasets. Compared to conventional deep learning approaches, the results demonstrate that BGFN achieves higher accuracy and enhanced reliability in navigation performance, particularly under prolonged GPS outages.
tldr: This paper introduces a brain-inspired spiking neural network (SNN) architecture, BGFN, for GPS/INS fusion to improve navigation accuracy during GPS outages, demonstrating superior performance compared to conventional deep learning methods in real-world tests.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种受大脑启发的脉冲神经网络(SNN)架构BGFN，用于GPS/INS融合，以提高GPS中断期间的导航精度。 真实世界的测试表明，与传统的深度学习方法相比，BGFN表现出更优越的性能。
summary_zh: 低成本惯性导航系统 (INS) 易受传感器偏差和测量噪声的影响，这会导致全球定位系统 (GPS) 中断期间导航精度迅速下降。 为了应对这一挑战并提高在 GPS 拒止环境中的定位连续性，本文提出了一种基于脉冲神经网络 (SNN) 的脑启发 GPS/INS 融合网络 (BGFN)。BGFN 架构集成了脉冲 Transformer 和脉冲编码器，以同时从惯性测量单元 (IMU) 信号中提取空间特征并捕获其时间动态。 通过建模车辆姿态、比力、角速率和 GPS 推导的位置增量之间的关系，该网络利用当前和历史 IMU 数据来估计车辆运动。通过真实世界的现场测试和公共数据集上的实验评估了所提出方法的有效性。 与传统的深度学习方法相比，结果表明BGFN 在导航性能方面实现了更高的精度和增强的可靠性，尤其是在长时间的 GPS 中断下。

title: A Pin-Array Structure for Gripping and Shape Recognition of Convex and Concave Terrain Profiles
summary: This paper presents a gripper capable of grasping and recognizing terrain shapes for mobile robots in extreme environments. Multi-limbed climbing robots with grippers are effective on rough terrains, such as cliffs and cave walls. However, such robots may fall over by misgrasping the surface or getting stuck owing to the loss of graspable points in unknown natural environments. To overcome these issues, we need a gripper capable of adaptive grasping to irregular terrains, not only for grasping but also for measuring the shape of the terrain surface accurately. We developed a gripper that can grasp both convex and concave terrains and simultaneously measure the terrain shape by introducing a pin-array structure. We demonstrated the mechanism of the gripper and evaluated its grasping and terrain recognition performance using a prototype. Moreover, the proposed pin-array design works well for 3D terrain mapping as well as adaptive grasping for irregular terrains.
tldr: This paper introduces a pin-array gripper for mobile robots to grasp and recognize both convex and concave terrain shapes, enabling adaptive grasping and 3D terrain mapping in extreme environments.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种用于移动机器人的针阵列夹持器，可以抓取和识别凸凹地形形状，从而实现在极端环境下进行自适应抓取和 3D 地形测绘。
summary_zh: 本文介绍了一种能够在极端环境中抓取和识别地形形状的夹爪，用于移动机器人。具有夹爪的多肢攀爬机器人在崎岖地形上，例如悬崖和洞穴壁，表现出高效性。然而，此类机器人可能因错误抓握表面而跌倒，或因在未知的自然环境中失去可抓握点而受困。为了克服这些问题，我们需要一种能够适应不规则地形的自适应抓握夹爪，不仅用于抓握，而且能够精确测量地形表面的形状。我们开发了一种能够抓握凸起和凹陷地形的夹爪，并通过引入针阵列结构同时测量地形形状。我们展示了夹爪的机构，并通过原型评估了其抓握和地形识别性能。此外，所提出的针阵列设计在3D地形测绘以及不规则地形的自适应抓握方面都表现良好。

title: μDopplerTag: CNN-Based Drone Recognition via Cooperative Micro-Doppler Tagging
summary: The rapid deployment of drones poses significant challenges for airspace management, security, and surveillance. Current detection and classification technologies, including cameras, LiDAR, and conventional radar systems, often struggle to reliably identify and differentiate drones, especially those of similar models, under diverse environmental conditions and at extended ranges. Moreover, low radar cross sections and clutter further complicate accurate drone identification. To address these limitations, we propose a novel drone classification method based on artificial micro-Doppler signatures encoded by resonant electromagnetic stickers attached to drone blades. These tags generate distinctive, configuration-specific radar returns, enabling robust identification. We develop a tailored convolutional neural network (CNN) capable of processing raw radar signals, achieving high classification accuracy. Extensive experiments were conducted both in anechoic chambers with 43 tag configurations and outdoors under realistic flight trajectories and noise conditions. Dimensionality reduction techniques, including Principal Component Analysis (PCA) and Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP), provided insight into code separability and robustness. Our results demonstrate reliable drone classification performance at signal-to-noise ratios as low as 7 dB, indicating the feasibility of long-range detection with advanced surveillance radar systems. Preliminary range estimations indicate potential operational distances of several kilometers, suitable for critical applications such as airport airspace monitoring. The integration of electromagnetic tagging with machine learning enables scalable and efficient drone identification, paving the way for enhanced aerial traffic management and security in increasingly congested airspaces.
tldr: This paper proposes a novel drone classification method using CNNs to analyze micro-Doppler signatures from electromagnetic tags attached to drone blades, achieving robust identification even at low signal-to-noise ratios and potentially long ranges.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新颖的无人机分类方法，使用卷积神经网络分析附着在无人机叶片上的电磁标签产生的微多普勒签名，即使在低信噪比和潜在的远距离下也能实现稳健的识别。
summary_zh: 无人机的快速部署给空域管理、安全和监视带来了重大挑战。当前的检测和分类技术，包括摄像头、激光雷达和传统雷达系统，在各种环境条件下和远距离范围内，通常难以可靠地识别和区分无人机，特别是那些相似型号的无人机。此外，低的雷达截面积和杂波进一步增加了准确识别无人机的难度。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出了一种基于人工微多普勒特征的新型无人机分类方法，该特征由附在无人机旋翼上的谐振电磁贴纸编码。这些标签产生独特的、特定于配置的雷达回波，从而实现稳健的识别。我们开发了一种定制的卷积神经网络（CNN），能够处理原始雷达信号，实现高分类精度。在消声室中对 43 种标签配置以及在户外真实飞行轨迹和噪声条件下进行了大量实验。包括主成分分析（PCA）和均匀流形逼近和投影（UMAP）在内的降维技术提供了对编码可分离性和鲁棒性的深入了解。我们的结果表明，在信噪比低至 7 dB 的情况下，无人机分类性能依然可靠，表明利用先进监视雷达系统进行远距离检测的可行性。初步的距离估计表明潜在的操作距离可达数公里，适用于机场空域监控等关键应用。电磁标签与机器学习的集成实现了可扩展且高效的无人机识别，为在日益拥挤的空域中加强空中交通管理和安全铺平了道路。

title: WebTrap Park: An Automated Platform for Systematic Security Evaluation of Web Agents
summary: Web Agents are increasingly deployed to perform complex tasks in real web environments, yet their security evaluation remains fragmented and difficult to standardize. We present WebTrap Park, an automated platform for systematic security evaluation of Web Agents through direct observation of their concrete interactions with live web pages. WebTrap Park instantiates three major sources of security risk into 1,226 executable evaluation tasks and enables action based assessment without requiring agent modification. Our results reveal clear security differences across agent frameworks, highlighting the importance of agent architecture beyond the underlying model. WebTrap Park is publicly accessible at https://security.fudan.edu.cn/webagent and provides a scalable foundation for reproducible Web Agent security evaluation.
tldr: WebTrap Park is an automated platform for systematically evaluating web agent security by observing how they interact with live web pages, revealing security differences across frameworks.
tldr_zh: WebTrap Park是一个自动化的平台，通过观察Web Agent与真实网页的交互来系统评估其安全性，揭示了不同框架之间的安全差异。
summary_zh: Web代理越来越多地被部署来执行复杂网络环境中的任务，然而，其安全评估仍然分散化且难以标准化。我们提出了WebTrap Park，一个自动化平台，用于通过直接观察Web代理与真实网页的实际交互，对其进行系统的安全评估。WebTrap Park将三个主要的安全风险来源实例化为1226个可执行的评估任务，并支持基于动作的评估，而无需修改代理。我们的结果揭示了不同代理框架之间明显的安全差异，突出了代理架构的重要性，而不仅仅是底层模型。WebTrap Park可在https://security.fudan.edu.cn/webagent公开访问，并为可复现的Web代理安全评估提供了一个可扩展的基础。

title: An Axiomatic Approach to General Intelligence: SANC(E3) -- Self-organizing Active Network of Concepts with Energy E3
summary: General intelligence must reorganize experience into internal structures that enable prediction and action under finite resources. Existing systems implicitly presuppose fixed primitive units -- tokens, subwords, pixels, or predefined sensor channels -- thereby bypassing the question of how representational units themselves emerge and stabilize. This paper proposes SANC(E3), an axiomatic framework in which representational units are not given a priori but instead arise as stable outcomes of competitive selection, reconstruction, and compression under finite activation capacity, governed by the explicit minimization of an energy functional E3. SANC(E3) draws a principled distinction between system tokens -- structural anchors such as {here, now, I} and sensory sources -- and tokens that emerge through self-organization during co-occurring events. Five core axioms formalize finite capacity, association from co-occurrence, similarity-based competition, confidence-based stabilization, and the reconstruction-compression-update trade-off. A key feature is a pseudo-memory-mapped I/O mechanism, through which internally replayed Gestalts are processed via the same axiomatic pathway as external sensory input. As a result, perception, imagination, prediction, planning, and action are unified within a single representational and energetic process. From the axioms, twelve propositions are derived, showing that category formation, hierarchical organization, unsupervised learning, and high-level cognitive activities can all be understood as instances of Gestalt completion under E3 minimization.
tldr: The paper proposes a self-organizing framework, SANC(E3), for general intelligence based on axiomatic principles and energy minimization, aiming to unify perception, imagination, prediction, planning, and action within a single process.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于公理和能量最小化的通用智能自组织框架SANC(E3)，旨在将感知、想象、预测、计划和行动统一在一个过程中。
summary_zh: 通用智能必须将经验重组为内部结构，从而在有限资源下实现预测和行动。现有系统隐式地预设了固定的基本单元——如token、子词、像素或预定义的传感器通道——从而绕过了表征单元本身如何涌现和稳定这一问题。本文提出了SANC(E3)，一个公理化框架，其中表征单元并非先验给定，而是作为竞争选择、重构和压缩在有限激活能力下的稳定结果涌现，并由能量泛函E3的显式最小化所支配。SANC(E3)对系统token（例如{这里，现在，我}）和感觉源，以及在共现事件期间通过自组织涌现的token进行了原则性的区分。五个核心公理形式化了有限容量、共现关联、基于相似性的竞争、基于置信度的稳定化以及重构-压缩-更新的权衡。一个关键特征是伪内存映射的I/O机制，通过它，内部重放的格式塔（Gestalt）通过与外部感觉输入相同的公理化路径进行处理。因此，感知、想象、预测、计划和行动被统一在单一的表征和能量过程中。从这些公理中，推导出了十二个命题，表明类别形成、层级组织、无监督学习和高层次认知活动都可以被理解为E3最小化下的格式塔补全的实例。

title: How vehicles change lanes after encountering crashes: Empirical analysis and modeling
summary: When a traffic crash occurs, following vehicles need to change lanes to bypass the obstruction. We define these maneuvers as post crash lane changes. In such scenarios, vehicles in the target lane may refuse to yield even after the lane change has already begun, increasing the complexity and crash risk of post crash LCs. However, the behavioral characteristics and motion patterns of post crash LCs remain unknown. To address this gap, we construct a post crash LC dataset by extracting vehicle trajectories from drone videos captured after crashes. Our empirical analysis reveals that, compared to mandatory LCs (MLCs) and discretionary LCs (DLCs), post crash LCs exhibit longer durations, lower insertion speeds, and higher crash risks. Notably, 79.4% of post crash LCs involve at least one instance of non yielding behavior from the new follower, compared to 21.7% for DLCs and 28.6% for MLCs. Building on these findings, we develop a novel trajectory prediction framework for post crash LCs. At its core is a graph based attention module that explicitly models yielding behavior as an auxiliary interaction aware task. This module is designed to guide both a conditional variational autoencoder and a Transformer based decoder to predict the lane changer's trajectory. By incorporating the interaction aware module, our model outperforms existing baselines in trajectory prediction performance by more than 10% in both average displacement error and final displacement error across different prediction horizons. Moreover, our model provides more reliable crash risk analysis by reducing false crash rates and improving conflict prediction accuracy. Finally, we validate the model's transferability using additional post crash LC datasets collected from different sites.
tldr: This paper analyzes vehicle lane changes after crashes using drone footage, identifying unique behavioral characteristics and developing a trajectory prediction model that incorporates yielding behavior, outperforming existing methods.
tldr_zh: 本文利用无人机拍摄的录像分析了车辆在撞车后变道的情况，识别出独特的行为特征，并开发了一种包含避让行为的轨迹预测模型，其性能优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 当发生交通事故时，后续车辆需要变换车道以绕过障碍物。我们将这些操作定义为事故后变道。在这种情况下，目标车道上的车辆可能会拒绝让行，即使变道已经开始，从而增加了事故后变道的复杂性和碰撞风险。然而，事故后变道的行为特征和运动模式仍然未知。为了弥补这一空白，我们通过提取无人机在事故后拍摄的视频中的车辆轨迹，构建了一个事故后变道数据集。我们的实证分析表明，与强制变道（MLCs）和自主变道（DLCs）相比，事故后变道表现出更长的持续时间、更低的插入速度和更高的碰撞风险。值得注意的是，79.4%的事故后变道至少涉及一次来自新后方车辆的拒不让行行为，而自主变道和强制变道分别为21.7%和28.6%。基于这些发现，我们开发了一个新的事故后变道轨迹预测框架。其核心是一个基于图的注意力模块，该模块将让行行为明确地建模为一个辅助的交互感知任务。该模块旨在引导条件变分自编码器和基于 Transformer 的解码器来预测变道车辆的轨迹。通过整合交互感知模块，我们的模型在不同预测范围内的平均位移误差和最终位移误差方面，轨迹预测性能均优于现有基线 10% 以上。此外，我们的模型通过降低虚警率和提高冲突预测准确性，提供了更可靠的碰撞风险分析。最后，我们使用从不同地点收集的额外事故后变道数据集验证了模型的迁移性。

title: A New Strategy for Verifying Reach-Avoid Specifications in Neural Feedback Systems
summary: Forward reachability analysis is the predominant approach for verifying reach-avoid properties in neural feedback systems (dynamical systems controlled by neural networks). This dominance stems from the limited scalability of existing backward reachability methods. In this work, we introduce new algorithms that compute both over- and under-approximations of backward reachable sets for such systems. We further integrate these backward algorithms with established forward analysis techniques to yield a unified verification framework for neural feedback systems.
tldr: This paper introduces new backward reachability analysis algorithms for neural feedback systems and integrates them with forward analysis for improved verification of reach-avoid properties.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的神经网络反馈系统的后向可达性分析算法，并将其与前向分析相结合，以改进对到达-避免属性的验证效果。
summary_zh: 前向可达性分析是验证神经反馈系统（由神经网络控制的动力系统）中可达-避免性质的主要方法。这种主导地位源于现有后向可达性方法的可扩展性有限。在这项工作中，我们引入了新的算法，用于计算此类系统后向可达集的过度逼近和欠逼近。我们进一步将这些后向算法与已建立的前向分析技术相结合，从而为神经反馈系统提供了一个统一的验证框架。

title: Forecast Aware Deep Reinforcement Learning for Efficient Electricity Load Scheduling in Dairy Farms
summary: Dairy farming is an energy intensive sector that relies heavily on grid electricity. With increasing renewable energy integration, sustainable energy management has become essential for reducing grid dependence and supporting the United Nations Sustainable Development Goal 7 on affordable and clean energy. However, the intermittent nature of renewables poses challenges in balancing supply and demand in real time. Intelligent load scheduling is therefore crucial to minimize operational costs while maintaining reliability. Reinforcement Learning has shown promise in improving energy efficiency and reducing costs. However, most RL-based scheduling methods assume complete knowledge of future prices or generation, which is unrealistic in dynamic environments. Moreover, standard PPO variants rely on fixed clipping or KL divergence thresholds, often leading to unstable training under variable tariffs. To address these challenges, this study proposes a Deep Reinforcement Learning framework for efficient load scheduling in dairy farms, focusing on battery storage and water heating under realistic operational constraints. The proposed Forecast Aware PPO incorporates short term forecasts of demand and renewable generation using hour of day and month based residual calibration, while the PID KL PPO variant employs a proportional integral derivative controller to regulate KL divergence for stable policy updates adaptively. Trained on real world dairy farm data, the method achieves up to 1% lower electricity cost than PPO, 4.8% than DQN, and 1.5% than SAC. For battery scheduling, PPO reduces grid imports by 13.1%, demonstrating scalability and effectiveness for sustainable energy management in modern dairy farming.
tldr: This paper proposes a forecast-aware deep reinforcement learning framework with a PID-controlled KL divergence PPO variant for efficient electricity load scheduling in dairy farms, demonstrating cost savings compared to other RL methods and reduced grid imports.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种具有预测感知能力的深度强化学习框架，该框架采用PID控制的KL散度PPO变体，用于奶牛场高效的电力负荷调度。结果表明，与其它强化学习方法相比，该方法能够降低成本并减少电网进口。
summary_zh: 奶牛养殖业是一个能源密集型行业，严重依赖电网电力。随着可再生能源整合的不断增加，可持续能源管理对于减少对电网的依赖以及支持联合国可持续发展目标7（经济适用的清洁能源）至关重要。然而，可再生能源的间歇性给实时平衡供需带来了挑战。因此，智能负荷调度对于在维持可靠性的同时最大限度地降低运营成本至关重要。强化学习已显示出在提高能源效率和降低成本方面的潜力。然而，大多数基于强化学习的调度方法都假设完全了解未来价格或发电量，这在动态环境中是不现实的。此外，标准的近端策略优化(PPO)变体依赖于固定的裁剪或KL散度阈值，这通常会导致可变电价下训练不稳定。为了应对这些挑战，本研究提出了一种深度强化学习框架，用于奶牛场的高效负荷调度，重点关注在实际运行约束下的电池储能和水加热。所提出的基于预测的PPO算法利用基于时段和月份的残差校准方法，纳入了需求和可再生能源发电的短期预测，而PID KL PPO变体则采用比例积分微分控制器来调节KL散度，以实现自适应的稳定策略更新。该方法在真实世界的奶牛场数据上进行训练，实现了比PPO低达1%的电力成本，比DQN低4.8%，比SAC低1.5%。对于电池调度，PPO减少了13.1%的电网进口，证明了其在现代奶牛养殖业中可持续能源管理的可扩展性和有效性。

title: Reinforcement Learning Methods for Neighborhood Selection in Local Search
summary: Reinforcement learning has recently gained traction as a means to improve combinatorial optimization methods, yet its effectiveness within local search metaheuristics specifically remains comparatively underexamined. In this study, we evaluate a range of reinforcement learning-based neighborhood selection strategies -- multi-armed bandits (upper confidence bound, $ε$-greedy) and deep reinforcement learning methods (proximal policy optimization, double deep $Q$-network) -- and compare them against multiple baselines across three different problems: the traveling salesman problem, the pickup and delivery problem with time windows, and the car sequencing problem. We show how search-specific characteristics, particularly large variations in cost due to constraint violation penalties, necessitate carefully designed reward functions to provide stable and informative learning signals. Our extensive experiments reveal that algorithm performance varies substantially across problems, although that $ε$-greedy consistently ranks among the best performers. In contrast, the computational overhead of deep reinforcement learning approaches only makes them competitive with a substantially longer runtime. These findings highlight both the promise and the practical limitations of deep reinforcement learning in local search.
tldr: This paper explores reinforcement learning (RL) for neighborhood selection in local search metaheuristics, finding that simpler methods like ε-greedy often outperform deep RL, especially considering computational cost, across combinatorial optimization problems.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了强化学习(RL)在局部搜索元启发式算法中用于邻域选择的方法。研究发现，在组合优化问题中，考虑到计算成本，像ε-greedy这样的简单方法通常优于深度强化学习。
summary_zh: 强化学习近来作为改进组合优化方法的一种手段备受关注，然而，其在局部搜索元启发式算法中的有效性却相对缺乏研究。在本研究中，我们评估了一系列基于强化学习的邻域选择策略——多臂老虎机（上限置信区间，ε-贪婪）和深度强化学习方法（近端策略优化，双重深度Q网络），并将它们与三种不同问题中的多个基线进行比较：旅行商问题、带时间窗的取送货问题和汽车排序问题。我们展示了搜索的具体特征，特别是由于违反约束惩罚而导致的成本大幅变化，如何需要精心设计的奖励函数，以提供稳定且信息丰富的学习信号。我们广泛的实验表明，算法性能在不同问题中差异很大，尽管ε-贪婪始终名列前茅。相比之下，深度强化学习方法的计算开销使其仅在显著更长的运行时间内才具有竞争力。这些发现突出了深度强化学习在局部搜索中的希望和实际局限性。

title: REVNET: Rotation-Equivariant Point Cloud Completion via Vector Neuron Anchor Transformer
summary: Incomplete point clouds captured by 3D sensors often result in the loss of both geometric and semantic information. Most existing point cloud completion methods are built on rotation-variant frameworks trained with data in canonical poses, limiting their applicability in real-world scenarios. While data augmentation with random rotations can partially mitigate this issue, it significantly increases the learning burden and still fails to guarantee robust performance under arbitrary poses. To address this challenge, we propose the Rotation-Equivariant Anchor Transformer (REVNET), a novel framework built upon the Vector Neuron (VN) network for robust point cloud completion under arbitrary rotations. To preserve local details, we represent partial point clouds as sets of equivariant anchors and design a VN Missing Anchor Transformer to predict the positions and features of missing anchors. Furthermore, we extend VN networks with a rotation-equivariant bias formulation and a ZCA-based layer normalization to improve feature expressiveness.
