Leveraging the flexible conversion between equivariant and invariant VN features, our model can generate point coordinates with greater stability. Experimental results show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches on the synthetic MVP dataset in the equivariant setting. On the real-world KITTI dataset, REVNET delivers competitive results compared to non-equivariant networks, without requiring input pose alignment. The source code will be released on GitHub under URL: https://github.com/nizhf/REVNET.
tldr: The paper introduces REVNET, a rotation-equivariant point cloud completion framework using a Vector Neuron Anchor Transformer, outperforming state-of-the-art methods in rotation-equivariant settings and achieving competitive results on real-world datasets without pose alignment.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了REVNET，一个使用向量神经元锚点变换器的旋转等变点云补全框架，在旋转等变设置中优于最先进的方法，并在真实世界数据集中取得了具有竞争力的结果，而无需姿势对齐。
summary_zh: 由3D传感器捕获的不完整点云经常导致几何和语义信息的丢失。现有的大多数点云补全方法都建立在旋转变体的框架之上，这些框架使用规范姿态的数据进行训练，限制了它们在真实场景中的适用性。虽然使用随机旋转的数据增强可以在一定程度上缓解这个问题，但它显著增加了学习负担，仍然无法保证在任意姿态下的鲁棒性能。为了解决这个挑战，我们提出了旋转等变锚点Transformer (REVNET)，这是一个建立在向量神经元(VN)网络之上的新颖框架，用于在任意旋转下进行鲁棒的点云补全。为了保留局部细节，我们将部分点云表示为一组等变锚点，并设计了一个VN缺失锚点Transformer来预测缺失锚点的位置和特征。此外，我们通过旋转等变偏差公式和基于ZCA的层归一化来扩展VN网络，以提高特征表达能力。利用等变和不变VN特征之间的灵活转换，我们的模型能够以更高的稳定性生成点坐标。实验结果表明，我们的方法在等变设置下，在合成MVP数据集上优于最先进的方法。在真实世界的KITTI数据集上，REVNET在不需要输入姿态对齐的情况下，与非等变网络相比，提供了具有竞争力的结果。源代码将在GitHub上发布，网址为：https://github.com/nizhf/REVNET。

title: Modality-Decoupled RGB-Thermal Object Detector via Query Fusion
summary: The advantage of RGB-Thermal (RGB-T) detection lies in its ability to perform modality fusion and integrate cross-modality complementary information, enabling robust detection under diverse illumination and weather conditions. However, under extreme conditions where one modality exhibits poor quality and disturbs detection, modality separation is necessary to mitigate the impact of noise. To address this problem, we propose a Modality-Decoupled RGB-T detection framework with Query Fusion (MDQF) to balance modality complementation and separation. In this framework, DETR-like detectors are employed as separate branches for the RGB and TIR images, with query fusion interspersed between the two branches in each refinement stage. Herein, query fusion is performed by feeding the high-quality queries from one branch to the other one after query selection and adaptation. This design effectively excludes the degraded modality and corrects the predictions using high-quality queries. Moreover, the decoupled framework allows us to optimize each individual branch with unpaired RGB or TIR images, eliminating the need for paired RGB-T data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach delivers superior performance to existing RGB-T detectors and achieves better modality independence.
tldr: This paper introduces a Modality-Decoupled RGB-T object detection framework (MDQF) with query fusion to improve robustness in RGB-Thermal detection under varying conditions by balancing modality complementation and separation, even with unpaired data.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种具有查询融合的解耦RGB-T对象检测框架（MDQF），通过平衡模态互补和分离，提高RGB-Thermal检测在各种条件下的鲁棒性，即使使用非配对数据也能有效工作。
summary_zh: RGB-T检测的优势在于其能够进行模态融合并整合跨模态互补信息，从而在各种光照和天气条件下实现稳健检测。然而，在一种模态质量较差并干扰检测的极端条件下，模态分离对于减轻噪声的影响是必要的。为解决这个问题，我们提出了一种具有查询融合的模态解耦RGB-T检测框架（MDQF），以平衡模态互补和分离。在该框架中，类DETR的检测器被用作RGB和TIR图像的独立分支，并在每个细化阶段在两个分支之间穿插查询融合。在此，查询融合通过在查询选择和适配后，将来自一个分支的高质量查询馈送到另一个分支来执行。这种设计有效地排除了降级模态，并使用高质量查询来纠正预测。此外，解耦框架允许我们使用不成对的RGB或TIR图像来优化每个独立分支，从而消除了对成对RGB-T数据的需求。大量实验表明，我们的方法比现有的RGB-T检测器表现出更优越的性能，并实现了更好的模态独立性。

title: YOLOBirDrone: Dataset for Bird vs Drone Detection and Classification and a YOLO based enhanced learning architecture
summary: The use of aerial drones for commercial and defense applications has benefited in many ways and is therefore utilized in several different application domains. However, they are also increasingly used for targeted attacks, posing a significant safety challenge and necessitating the development of drone detection systems. Vision-based drone detection systems currently have an accuracy limitation and struggle to distinguish between drones and birds, particularly when the birds are small in size. This research work proposes a novel YOLOBirDrone architecture that improves the detection and classification accuracy of birds and drones. YOLOBirDrone has different components, including an adaptive and extended layer aggregation (AELAN), a multi-scale progressive dual attention module (MPDA), and a reverse MPDA (RMPDA) to preserve shape information and enrich features with local and global spatial and channel information. A large-scale dataset, BirDrone, is also introduced in this article, which includes small and challenging objects for robust aerial object identification. Experimental results demonstrate an improvement in performance metrics through the proposed YOLOBirDrone architecture compared to other state-of-the-art algorithms, with detection accuracy reaching approximately 85% across various scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces a new dataset (BirDrone) and a YOLO-based architecture (YOLOBirDrone) for improved bird vs. drone detection and classification, claiming increased accuracy.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的数据集 (BirDrone) 和一个基于 YOLO 的架构 (YOLOBirDrone)，用于改进鸟类与无人机的检测和分类，并声称提高了准确性。
summary_zh: 无人机在商业和国防领域的应用受益匪浅，因此被广泛应用于多个不同的应用领域。然而，它们也日益被用于定向攻击，构成了重大的安全挑战，并迫切需要开发无人机检测系统。目前，基于视觉的无人机检测系统存在准确率限制，并且难以区分无人机和鸟类，尤其是在鸟类体型较小的情况下。本研究提出了一种新型YOLOBirDrone架构，以提高鸟类和无人机的检测和分类准确率。YOLOBirDrone包含不同的组件，包括自适应拓展层聚合(AELAN)、多尺度渐进式双重注意力模块(MPDA)和反向MPDA(RMPDA)，以保留形状信息并利用局部和全局空间和通道信息来丰富特征。本文还引入了一个大型数据集BirDrone，其中包含小型和具有挑战性的目标，以实现稳健的空中目标识别。实验结果表明，与其它最先进的算法相比，所提出的YOLOBirDrone架构在性能指标方面有所提高，并且在各种场景下的检测准确率达到约85%。

title: An Efficient Additive Kolmogorov-Arnold Transformer for Point-Level Maize Localization in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Imagery
summary:
High-resolution UAV photogrammetry has become a key technology for precision agriculture, enabling centimeter-level crop monitoring and point-level plant localization. However, point-level maize localization in UAV imagery remains challenging due to (1) extremely small object-to-pixel ratios, typically less than 0.1%, (2) prohibitive computational costs of quadratic attention on ultra-high-resolution images larger than 3000 x 4000 pixels, and (3) agricultural scene-specific complexities such as sparse object distribution and environmental variability that are poorly handled by general-purpose vision models.
  To address these challenges, we propose the Additive Kolmogorov-Arnold Transformer (AKT), which replaces conventional multilayer perceptrons with Pade Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (PKAN) modules to enhance functional expressivity for small-object feature extraction, and introduces PKAN Additive Attention (PAA) to model multiscale spatial dependencies with reduced computational complexity. In addition, we present the Point-based Maize Localization (PML) dataset, consisting of 1,928 high-resolution UAV images with approximately 501,000 point annotations collected under real field conditions.
  Extensive experiments show that AKT achieves an average F1-score of 62.8%, outperforming state-of-the-art methods by 4.2%, while reducing FLOPs by 12.6% and improving inference throughput by 20.7%. For downstream tasks, AKT attains a mean absolute error of 7.1 in stand counting and a root mean square error of 1.95-1.97 cm in interplant spacing estimation. These results demonstrate that integrating Kolmogorov-Arnold representation theory with efficient attention mechanisms offers an effective framework for high-resolution agricultural remote sensing.
tldr: The paper introduces the Additive Kolmogorov-Arnold Transformer (AKT) for point-level maize localization in UAV imagery, achieving improved F1-score and efficiency compared to state-of-the-art methods. They also introduce a large dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了用于无人机图像中玉米点级定位的加性柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德变换器 (AKT)，与最先进的方法相比，F1 分数和效率均有所提高。 并介绍了一个大型数据集。
summary_zh:
高分辨率无人机摄影测量已成为精准农业的关键技术，能够实现厘米级的作物监测和点级的植物定位。然而，由于以下原因，在无人机影像中进行点级玉米定位仍然具有挑战性：(1)极小的目标像素比，通常小于0.1%；(2)在大于3000 x 4000像素的超高分辨率图像上进行二次注意力计算的高昂算力成本；(3)农业场景的特殊复杂性，例如稀疏的目标分布和环境可变性，这些问题难以被通用视觉模型有效处理。

为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了加性柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德变换器（AKT），它使用帕德-柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德网络（PKAN）模块替换传统的多层感知机，以增强小目标特征提取的功能表达性，并引入PKAN加性注意力（PAA）来建模具有降低计算复杂度的多尺度空间依赖性。此外，我们提出了基于点的玉米定位（PML）数据集，该数据集由1,928张高分辨率无人机图像组成，包含在真实田间条件下采集的约501,000个点标注。

大量的实验表明，AKT实现了62.8%的平均F1分数，比最先进的方法高出4.2%，同时降低了12.6%的 FLOPs，并将推理吞吐量提高了20.7%。对于下游任务，AKT在株数计数中实现了7.1的平均绝对误差，在株间距估计中实现了1.95-1.97厘米的均方根误差。这些结果表明，将柯尔莫哥洛夫-阿诺德表示理论与高效的注意力机制相结合，为高分辨率农业遥感提供了一个有效的框架。

title: A Hybrid Model-based and Data-based Approach Developed for a Prosthetic Hand Wrist
summary: The incorporation of advanced control algorithms into prosthetic hands significantly enhances their ability to replicate the intricate motions of a human hand. This work introduces a model-based controller that combines an Artificial Neural Network (ANN) approach with a Sliding Mode Controller (SMC) designed for a tendon-driven soft continuum wrist integrated into a prosthetic hand known as "PRISMA HAND II". Our research focuses on developing a controller that provides a fast dynamic response with reduced computational effort during wrist motions. The proposed controller consists of an ANN for computing bending angles together with an SMC to regulate tendon forces. Kinematic and dynamic models of the wrist are formulated using the Piece-wise Constant Curvature (PCC) hypothesis. The performance of the proposed controller is compared with other control strategies developed for the same wrist. Simulation studies and experimental validations of the fabricated wrist using the controller are included in the paper.
tldr: This paper presents a hybrid ANN and Sliding Mode Controller (SMC) for a prosthetic hand wrist, aiming for faster dynamic response and reduced computational effort, validated through simulations and experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合人工神经网络（ANN）和滑模控制器（SMC）用于假肢手腕，旨在实现更快的动态响应和更低的计算量，并通过仿真和实验进行了验证。
summary_zh: 将先进控制算法融入假肢手能够显著增强其复制人手复杂运动的能力。本文介绍了一种基于模型的控制器，该控制器结合了人工神经网络（ANN）方法和滑模控制器（SMC），专为集成到名为“PRISMA HAND II”的假肢手中的腱驱动软体连续体腕关节而设计。 我们的研究重点是开发一种控制器，在腕关节运动期间提供快速的动态响应并降低计算量。 所提出的控制器由用于计算弯曲角度的ANN和用于调节肌腱力的SMC组成。 使用分段恒定曲率（PCC）假设建立了腕关节的运动学和动力学模型。 将所提出的控制器的性能与为同一腕关节开发的其他控制策略进行了比较。 论文中包含了使用该控制器对所制造腕关节进行的仿真研究和实验验证。

title: QP-Based Control of an Underactuated Aerial Manipulator under Constraints
summary: This paper presents a constraint-aware control framework for underactuated aerial manipulators, enabling accurate end-effector trajectory tracking while explicitly accounting for safety and feasibility constraints. The control problem is formulated as a quadratic program that computes dynamically consistent generalized accelerations subject to underactuation, actuator bounds, and system constraints. To enhance robustness against disturbances, modeling uncertainties, and steady-state errors, a passivity-based integral action is incorporated at the torque level without compromising feasibility. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated through high-fidelity physics-based simulations, which include parameter perturbations, viscous joint friction, and realistic sensing and state-estimation effects. This demonstrates accurate tracking, smooth control inputs, and reliable constraint satisfaction under realistic operating conditions.
tldr: This paper presents a quadratic programming (QP)-based control framework for underactuated aerial manipulators, incorporating constraints and passivity-based integral action for robust and accurate trajectory tracking. High-fidelity simulations validate its effectiveness.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于二次规划（QP）的欠驱动空中机械臂控制框架，该框架结合了约束和基于被动性的积分作用，以实现鲁棒和精确的轨迹跟踪。高保真仿真验证了其有效性。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种约束感知控制框架，用于欠驱动空中机械臂，能够在显式考虑安全性和可行性约束的同时，实现精确的末端执行器轨迹跟踪。该控制问题被构建为一个二次规划，计算动态一致的广义加速度，其满足欠驱动、执行器边界和系统约束。为了增强对扰动、建模不确定性和稳态误差的鲁棒性，在不影响可行性的前提下，在力矩层面上引入了基于无源性的积分作用。通过高保真物理仿真验证了所提出方法的有效性，仿真包含参数扰动、粘性关节摩擦以及真实的传感和状态估计影响。结果表明在实际运行条件下，该方法能够实现精确跟踪、平滑的控制输入以及可靠的约束满足。

title: Keyframe-based Dense Mapping with the Graph of View-Dependent Local Maps
summary: In this article, we propose a new keyframe-based mapping system. The proposed method updates local Normal Distribution Transform maps (NDT) using data from an RGB-D sensor. The cells of the NDT are stored in 2D view-dependent structures to better utilize the properties and uncertainty model of RGB-D cameras. This method naturally represents an object closer to the camera origin with higher precision. The local maps are stored in the pose graph which allows correcting global map after loop closure detection. We also propose a procedure that allows merging and filtering local maps to obtain a global map of the environment. Finally, we compare our method with Octomap and NDT-OM and provide example applications of the proposed mapping method.
tldr: This paper introduces a keyframe-based dense mapping system using RGB-D data and view-dependent NDT maps within a pose graph for loop closure correction and global map generation, comparing its performance against Octomap and NDT-OM.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于关键帧的稠密地图构建系统，该系统利用RGB-D数据和视点相关的NDT地图，并在姿态图中进行回环闭合校正和全局地图生成，并将其性能与Octomap和NDT-OM进行了比较。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种新的基于关键帧的地图构建系统。该方法利用来自RGB-D传感器的数据更新局部正态分布变换(NDT)地图。NDT的单元格存储在二维视角相关的结构中，以更好地利用RGB-D相机的特性和不确定性模型。这种方法自然地能够以更高的精度表示更靠近相机原点的物体。局部地图存储在姿态图中，这允许在闭环检测后校正全局地图。我们还提出了一种程序，该程序允许合并和过滤局部地图以获得环境的全局地图。最后，我们将提出的方法与Octomap和NDT-OM进行了比较，并提供了所提出地图构建方法的示例应用。

title: Contact-aware Path Planning for Autonomous Neuroendovascular Navigation
summary: We propose a deterministic and time-efficient contact-aware path planner for neurovascular navigation. The algorithm leverages information from pre- and intra-operative images of the vessels to navigate pre-bent passive tools, by intelligently predicting and exploiting interactions with the anatomy. A kinematic model is derived and employed by the sampling-based planner for tree expansion that utilizes simplified motion primitives. This approach enables fast computation of the feasible path, with negligible loss in accuracy, as demonstrated in diverse and representative anatomies of the vessels. In these anatomical demonstrators, the algorithm shows a 100% convergence rate within 22.8s in the worst case, with sub-millimeter tracking errors (less than 0.64 mm), and is found effective on anatomical phantoms representative of around 94% of patients.
tldr: The paper presents a contact-aware path planning algorithm for autonomous neuroendovascular navigation using pre- and intra-operative images, demonstrating fast computation and high convergence rates in simulated and phantom anatomies.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种基于术前和术中图像的接触感知路径规划算法，用于自主神经血管内导航，并在模拟和体模解剖结构中展示了快速计算和高收敛率。
summary_zh:
摘要：
我们提出了一种确定性的、时间高效的、具有接触感知的神经血管导航路径规划器。该算法利用血管的术前和术中图像信息，通过智能预测和利用与解剖结构的交互，来导航预弯的被动工具。推导了一个运动学模型，并由基于采样的规划器在树扩展中使用该模型，该规划器利用简化的运动原语。这种方法能够快速计算可行路径，且精度损失可忽略不计，这已在血管的各种代表性解剖结构中得到证明。在这些解剖结构验证中，该算法在最坏情况下显示出100%的收敛率，耗时22.8秒，具有亚毫米级的跟踪误差（小于0.64毫米），并且发现其在代表约94%患者的解剖模型上有效。

title: Grid-Aware Charging and Operational Optimization for Mixed-Fleet Public Transit
summary: The rapid growth of urban populations and the increasing need for sustainable transportation solutions have prompted a shift towards electric buses in public transit systems. However, the effective management of mixed fleets consisting of both electric and diesel buses poses significant operational challenges. One major challenge is coping with dynamic electricity pricing, where charging costs vary throughout the day. Transit agencies must optimize charging assignments in response to such dynamism while accounting for secondary considerations such as seating constraints. This paper presents a comprehensive mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) model to address these challenges by jointly optimizing charging schedules and trip assignments for mixed (electric and diesel bus) fleets while considering factors such as dynamic electricity pricing, vehicle capacity, and route constraints. We address the potential computational intractability of the MILP formulation, which can arise even with relatively small fleets, by employing a hierarchical approach tailored to the fleet composition. By using real-world data from the city of Chattanooga, Tennessee, USA, we show that our approach can result in significant savings in the operating costs of the mixed transit fleets.
tldr: The paper proposes a mixed-integer linear programming model to optimize charging schedules and trip assignments for mixed electric and diesel bus fleets, considering dynamic electricity pricing and fleet composition, demonstrated with real-world data.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合整数线性规划模型，用于优化混合电动和柴油公交车队的充电计划和行程分配，考虑了动态电价和车队组成，并使用真实世界的数据进行了演示。
summary_zh: 城市人口的快速增长和对可持续交通解决方案日益增长的需求促使公共交通系统向电动公交车转型。然而，对包含电动公交车和柴油公交车的混合车队进行有效管理带来了显著的运营挑战。其中一个主要挑战是应对动态电价，即充电成本全天都在变化。公交运输机构必须在考虑到座位限制等次要因素的同时，优化充电分配以应对这种动态性。 本文提出了一种综合性的混合整数线性规划 (MILP) 模型，通过联合优化混合（电动和柴油公交车）车队的充电计划和行程分配，同时考虑动态电价、车辆容量和路线约束等因素，来应对这些挑战。我们采用针对车队组成的层级方法，解决了MILP公式可能存在的计算复杂性问题，即使对于相对较小的车队也可能出现这种复杂性。通过使用来自美国田纳西州查塔努加市的真实数据，我们证明我们的方法可以显著节省混合公交车队的运营成本。

title: VGG Induced Deep Hand Sign Language Detection
summary: Hand gesture recognition is an important aspect of human-computer interaction. It forms the basis of sign language for the visually impaired people. This work proposes a novel hand gesture recognizing system for the differently-abled persons. The model uses a convolutional neural network, known as VGG-16 net, for building a trained model on a widely used image dataset by employing Python and Keras libraries. Furthermore, the result is validated by the NUS dataset, consisting of 10 classes of hand gestures, fed to the model as the validation set. Afterwards, a testing dataset of 10 classes is built by employing Google's open source Application Programming Interface (API) that captures different gestures of human hand and the efficacy is then measured by carrying out experiments. The experimental results show that by combining a transfer learning mechanism together with the image data augmentation, the VGG-16 net produced around 98% accuracy.
tldr: This paper proposes a hand gesture recognition system for sign language using a VGG-16-based convolutional neural network, achieving 98% accuracy through transfer learning and data augmentation.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于VGG-16卷积神经网络的手势识别系统，用于手语识别，通过迁移学习和数据增强实现了98%的准确率。
summary_zh: 手势识别是人机交互的重要组成部分，也是视障人士手语的基础。本研究提出了一种面向残障人士的新型手势识别系统。该模型使用卷积神经网络，即VGG-16网络，通过Python和Keras库在一个广泛使用的图像数据集上构建训练模型。此外，使用包含10类手势的NUS数据集作为验证集，对结果进行验证。之后，利用谷歌的开源应用程序编程接口（API）建立一个包含10类手势的测试数据集，该API可以捕捉人手的不同手势，并通过实验测量其有效性。实验结果表明，将迁移学习机制与图像数据增强相结合，VGG-16网络产生了约98%的准确率。

title: DiffMM: Efficient Method for Accurate Noisy and Sparse Trajectory Map Matching via One Step Diffusion
summary: Map matching for sparse trajectories is a fundamental problem for many trajectory-based applications, e.g., traffic scheduling and traffic flow analysis. Existing methods for map matching are generally based on Hidden Markov Model (HMM) or encoder-decoder framework. However, these methods continue to face significant challenges when handling noisy or sparsely sampled GPS trajectories. To address these limitations, we propose DiffMM, an encoder-diffusion-based map matching framework that produces effective yet efficient matching results through a one-step diffusion process. We first introduce a road segment-aware trajectory encoder that jointly embeds the input trajectory and its surrounding candidate road segments into a shared latent space through an attention mechanism. Next, we propose a one step diffusion method to realize map matching through a shortcut model by leveraging the joint embedding of the trajectory and candidate road segments as conditioning context. We conduct extensive experiments on large-scale trajectory datasets, demonstrating that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art map matching methods in terms of both accuracy and efficiency, particularly for sparse trajectories and complex road network topologies.
tldr: This paper introduces DiffMM, an encoder-diffusion based map matching framework that uses a one-step diffusion process for accurate and efficient map matching, especially for noisy and sparse GPS trajectories. The approach outperforms existing methods in accuracy and speed on large-scale datasets.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为DiffMM的基于编码器-扩散的地图匹配框架，该框架使用单步扩散过程进行准确高效的地图匹配，尤其适用于噪声大和稀疏的GPS轨迹。该方法在大型数据集上的准确性和速度均优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 稀疏轨迹地图匹配是许多基于轨迹的应用（如交通调度和交通流分析）中的一个基本问题。现有的地图匹配方法通常基于隐马尔可夫模型(HMM)或编码器-解码器框架。然而，在处理噪声或稀疏采样的GPS轨迹时，这些方法仍然面临着严峻的挑战。为了解决这些局限性，我们提出DiffMM，一个基于编码器-扩散的地图匹配框架，通过一步扩散过程产生有效且高效的匹配结果。我们首先引入一个道路路段感知的轨迹编码器，通过注意力机制将输入轨迹及其周围的候选道路路段联合嵌入到一个共享的潜在空间中。接下来，我们提出一种一步扩散方法，通过利用轨迹和候选道路路段的联合嵌入作为条件上下文，通过捷径模型实现地图匹配。我们在大规模轨迹数据集上进行了广泛的实验，结果表明，我们的方法在准确性和效率方面始终优于最先进的地图匹配方法，尤其是在稀疏轨迹和复杂路网拓扑结构下。

title: A Hardware-Algorithm Co-Designed Framework for HDR Imaging and Dehazing in Extreme Rocket Launch Environments
summary: Quantitative optical measurement of critical mechanical parameters -- such as plume flow fields, shock wave structures, and nozzle oscillations -- during rocket launch faces severe challenges due to extreme imaging conditions. Intense combustion creates dense particulate haze and luminance variations exceeding 120 dB, degrading image data and undermining subsequent photogrammetric and velocimetric analyses. To address these issues, we propose a hardware-algorithm co-design framework that combines a custom Spatially Varying Exposure (SVE) sensor with a physics-aware dehazing algorithm. The SVE sensor acquires multi-exposure data in a single shot, enabling robust haze assessment without relying on idealized atmospheric models. Our approach dynamically estimates haze density, performs region-adaptive illumination optimization, and applies multi-scale entropy-constrained fusion to effectively separate haze from scene radiance. Validated on real launch imagery and controlled experiments, the framework demonstrates superior performance in recovering physically accurate visual information of the plume and engine region. This offers a reliable image basis for extracting key mechanical parameters, including particle velocity, flow instability frequency, and structural vibration, thereby supporting precise quantitative analysis in extreme aerospace environments.
tldr: The paper presents a hardware-algorithm co-designed framework for HDR imaging and dehazing in extreme rocket launch environments, combining a custom SVE sensor with a physics-aware dehazing algorithm to improve quantitative optical measurements.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于极端火箭发射环境中的HDR成像和去雾的硬件-算法协同设计框架，结合了定制的SVE传感器和物理感知的去雾算法，以提高定量光学测量的精度。
summary_zh: 火箭发射过程中，对关键机械参数（如羽流流场、激波结构和喷管振荡）进行定量光学测量，因极端的成像条件面临严峻挑战。剧烈的燃烧会产生高密度颗粒雾霾和超过120 dB的亮度变化，从而降低图像数据质量，并破坏后续的摄影测量和速度测量分析。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种硬件-算法协同设计框架，该框架将定制的空间变化曝光 (SVE) 传感器与物理感知去雾算法相结合。SVE传感器在单次拍摄中获取多重曝光数据，从而无需依赖理想化的大气模型即可进行稳健的雾霾评估。我们的方法动态估计雾霾密度，执行区域自适应照明优化，并应用多尺度熵约束融合来有效地将雾霾与场景辐射分离。在真实发射图像和受控实验中的验证表明，该框架在恢复羽流和发动机区域的物理精确视觉信息方面表现出卓越的性能。这为提取关键机械参数（包括粒子速度、流动不稳定性频率和结构振动）提供了可靠的图像基础，从而支持在极端的航空航天环境中进行精确的定量分析。

title: Beyond the Next Port: A Multi-Task Transformer for Forecasting Future Voyage Segment Durations
summary: Accurate forecasts of segment-level sailing durations are fundamental to enhancing maritime schedule reliability and optimizing long-term port operations. However, conventional estimated time of arrival (ETA) models are primarily designed for the immediate next port of call and rely heavily on real-time automatic identification system (AIS) data, which is inherently unavailable for future voyage segments. To address this gap, the study reformulates future-port ETA prediction as a segment-level time-series forecasting problem. We develop a transformer-based architecture that integrates historical sailing durations, destination port congestion proxies, and static vessel descriptors. The proposed framework employs a causally masked attention mechanism to capture long-range temporal dependencies and a multi-task learning head to jointly predict segment sailing durations and port congestion states, leveraging shared latent signals to mitigate high uncertainty. Evaluation on a real-world global dataset from 2021 demonstrates the proposed model consistently outperforms a comprehensive suite of competitive baselines. The result shows a relative reduction of 4.85% in mean absolute error (MAE) and 4.95% in mean absolute percentage error (MAPE) compared with sequence baseline models. The relative reductions with gradient boosting machines are 9.39% in MAE and 52.97% in MAPE. Case studies for the major destination port further illustrate the model's superior accuracy.
tldr: This paper presents a transformer-based multi-task learning model to forecast future voyage segment durations, significantly outperforming baselines by integrating vessel descriptors, historical data, and port congestion proxies.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的多任务学习模型，用于预测未来航程段的持续时间，通过整合船舶描述符、历史数据和港口拥堵代理，显著优于基线方法。
summary_zh: 准确预测分段航程所需时间对于提高海上运输的准班率和优化长期港口运营至关重要。然而，传统的预计到达时间（ETA）模型主要针对下一个停靠港设计，并且严重依赖实时自动识别系统（AIS）数据，而这些数据本质上无法用于未来的航程分段。为了解决这一差距，本研究将未来港口ETA预测重新定义为分段级别的时间序列预测问题。我们开发了一种基于Transformer的架构，该架构整合了历史航程时长、目的港拥堵代理指标和静态船舶描述符。所提出的框架采用因果掩码注意力机制来捕获长程时间依赖性，并采用多任务学习头来联合预测分段航程时长和港口拥堵状态，从而利用共享的潜在信号来缓解高不确定性。对来自2021年的真实世界全球数据集的评估表明，所提出的模型始终优于一系列具有竞争力的基线模型。结果显示，与序列基线模型相比，平均绝对误差（MAE）相对降低4.85%，平均绝对百分比误差（MAPE）相对降低4.95%。与梯度提升机的相对降低幅度分别为MAE 9.39%和MAPE 52.97%。主要目的港的案例研究进一步说明了该模型卓越的准确性。

title: A Qualitative Model to Reason about Object Rotations (QOR) applied to solve the Cube Comparison Test (CCT)
summary: This paper presents a Qualitative model for Reasoning about Object Rotations (QOR) which is applied to solve the Cube Comparison Test (CCT) by Ekstrom et al. (1976). A conceptual neighborhood graph relating the Rotation movement to the Location change and the Orientation change (CNGRLO) of the features on the cube sides has been built and it produces composition tables to calculate inferences for reasoning about rotations.
tldr: This paper introduces a qualitative model (QOR) for reasoning about object rotations, which is then applied to solve the Cube Comparison Test (CCT) using a conceptual neighborhood graph.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种用于推理物体旋转的定性模型（QOR），并将其应用于使用概念邻域图来解决立方体比较测试（CCT）。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种用于推理物体旋转的定性模型（QOR），并将其应用于解决Ekstrom等人（1976）提出的立方体比较测试（CCT）。建立了一个概念邻域图，该图将旋转运动与立方体侧面特征的位置变化和方向变化相关联（CNGRLO），并生成组合表以计算推理，从而进行旋转推理。

title: An IoT-Enabled Smart Aquarium System for Real-Time Water Quality Monitoring and Automated Feeding
summary: Maintaining optimal water quality in aquariums is critical for aquatic health but remains challenging due to the need for continuous monitoring of multiple parameters. Traditional manual methods are inefficient, labor-intensive, and prone to human error, often leading to suboptimal aquatic conditions. This paper presents an IoT-based smart aquarium system that addresses these limitations by integrating an ESP32 microcontroller with multiple sensors (pH, TDS, temperature, turbidity) and actuators (servo feeder, water pump) for comprehensive real-time water quality monitoring and automated control. The system architecture incorporates edge processing capabilities, cloud connectivity via Blynk IoT platform, and an intelligent alert mechanism with configurable cooldown periods to prevent notification fatigue. Experimental evaluation in a 10-liter aquarium environment demonstrated the system's effectiveness, achieving 96\% average sensor accuracy and 1.2-second response time for anomaly detection. The automated feeding and water circulation modules maintained 97\% operational reliability throughout extended testing, significantly reducing manual intervention while ensuring stable aquatic conditions. This research demonstrates that cost-effective IoT solutions can revolutionize aquarium maintenance, making aquatic ecosystem management more accessible, reliable, and efficient for both residential and commercial applications.
authors: A. S. M. Ahsanul Sarkar Akib
tldr: This paper introduces an IoT-based smart aquarium system for real-time water quality monitoring and automated feeding using an ESP32 microcontroller, various sensors, and the Blynk IoT platform, achieving high accuracy and reliability in experimental settings.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于物联网的智能水族箱系统，该系统利用 ESP32 微控制器、各种传感器和 Blynk IoT 平台进行实时水质监测和自动喂食，在实验环境中实现了高精度和可靠性。
summary_zh: 水族箱中维持最佳水质对水生生物的健康至关重要，但这仍然具有挑战性，因为需要持续监测多个参数。传统的手动方法效率低下、劳动强度大且容易出现人为错误，通常导致水生环境不佳。本文提出了一种基于物联网的智能水族箱系统，该系统通过将 ESP32 微控制器与多个传感器（pH、TDS、温度、浊度）和执行器（伺服喂食器、水泵）集成，以实现全面的实时水质监测和自动控制，从而解决了这些局限性。系统架构融合了边缘处理能力、通过 Blynk IoT 平台的云连接以及具有可配置冷却周期的智能警报机制，以防止通知疲劳。 在 10 升水族箱环境中的实验评估证明了该系统的有效性，实现了 96% 的平均传感器精度和 1.2 秒的异常检测响应时间。 自动喂食和水循环模块在整个扩展测试中保持了 97% 的运行可靠性，显著减少了手动干预，同时确保了稳定的水生条件。 这项研究表明，具有成本效益的物联网解决方案可以彻底改变水族箱维护，使住宅和商业应用的水生生态系统管理更加易于使用、可靠和高效。

title: Design and Development of a Low-Cost Scalable GSM-IoT Smart Pet Feeder with a Remote Mobile Application
summary: Pet ownership is increasingly common in modern households, yet maintaining a consistent feeding schedule remains challenging for the owners particularly those who live in cities and have busy lifestyles. This paper presents the design, development, and validation of a low-cost, scalable GSM-IoT smart pet feeder that enables remote monitoring and control through cellular communication. The device combines with an Arduino microcontroller, a SIM800L GSM module for communication, an ultrasonic sensor for real-time food-level assessment, and a servo mechanism for accurate portion dispensing. A dedicated mobile application was developed using MIT App Inventor which allows owners to send feeding commands and receive real-time status updates. Experimental results demonstrate a 98\% SMS command success rate, consistent portion dispensing with $\pm 2.67$\% variance, and reliable autonomous operation. Its modular, energy-efficient design makes it easy to use in a wide range of households, including those with limited resources. This work pushes forward the field of accessible pet care technology by providing a practical, scalable, and completely internet-independent solution for personalized pet feeding. In doing so, it sets a new benchmark for low-cost, GSM-powered automation in smart pet products.
authors: A. S. M. Ahsanul Sarkar Akib
tldr: This paper presents a low-cost, scalable GSM-IoT smart pet feeder with a mobile application for remote monitoring and control, validated with experimental results.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种低成本、可扩展的GSM-IoT智能宠物喂食器，配备移动应用程序，用于远程监控和控制，并通过实验结果进行了验证。
summary_zh: 宠物饲养在现代家庭中日益普及，但对于居住在城市且生活节奏快的主人来说，维持规律的喂食计划仍然具有挑战性。本文介绍了一种低成本、可扩展的GSM-IoT智能宠物喂食器，该喂食器通过蜂窝通信实现远程监控和控制的设计、开发和验证。该设备结合了Arduino微控制器、用于通信的SIM800L GSM模块、用于实时评估食物量的超声波传感器以及用于精确分配份量的伺服机构。使用MIT App Inventor开发了一个专门的移动应用程序，允许主人发送喂食指令并接收实时状态更新。实验结果表明，短信指令成功率达98%，份量分配的方差为$\pm 2.67$\%，且自主运行可靠。其模块化、节能的设计使其易于在广泛的家庭中使用，包括那些资源有限的家庭。这项工作通过为个性化宠物喂养提供一种实用、可扩展且完全独立于互联网的解决方案，推动了可访问宠物护理技术领域的发展。通过这样做，它为低成本、GSM供电的智能宠物产品自动化设定了新的基准。

title: Disentangling History and Propagation Dependencies in Cross-Subject Knee Contact Stress Prediction Using a Shared MeshGraphNet Backbone
summary: Background:Subject-specific finite element analysis accurately characterizes knee joint mechanics but is computationally expensive. Deep surrogate models provide a rapid alternative, yet their generalization across subjects under limited pose and load inputs remains unclear. It remains unclear whether the dominant source of prediction uncertainty arises from temporal history dependence or spatial propagation dependence. Methods:To disentangle these factors, we employed a shared MGN backbone with a fixed mesh topology. A dataset of running trials from nine subjects was constructed using an OpenSim-FEBio workflow. We developed four model variants to isolate specific dependencies: (1) a baseline MGN; (2) CT-MGN, incorporating a Control Transformer to encode short-horizon history; (3) MsgModMGN, applying state-conditioned modulation to message passing for adaptive propagation; (4) CT-MsgModMGN, combining both mechanisms. Models were evaluated using a rigorous grouped 3-fold cross-validation on unseen subjects.Results:The models incorporating history encoding significantly outperformed the baseline MGN and MsgModMGN in global accuracy and spatial consistency. Crucially, the CT module effectively mitigated the peak-shaving defect common in deep surrogates, significantly reducing peak stress prediction errors. In contrast, the spatial propagation modulation alone yielded no significant improvement over the baseline, and combining it with CT provided no additional benefit.Conclusion:Temporal history dependence, rather than spatial propagation modulation, is the primary driver of prediction uncertainty in cross-subject knee contact mechanics. Explicitly encoding short-horizon driver sequences enables the surrogate model to recover implicit phase information, thereby achieving superior fidelity in peak-stress capture and high-risk localization compared to purely state-based approaches.
tldr: This paper investigates the relative importance of temporal history and spatial propagation in predicting knee contact stress using a MeshGraphNet, finding that encoding short-horizon history significantly improves accuracy and peak stress prediction compared to spatial propagation modulation.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了使用MeshGraphNet预测膝关节接触应力时，时间历史和空间传播的相对重要性，发现相比于空间传播调制，对短期历史进行编码可以显著提高准确性和峰值应力预测。
summary_zh: 背景：个体化的有限元分析能准确描述膝关节力学，但计算成本高昂。深度代理模型提供了一种快速的替代方案，但其在有限的姿态和载荷输入下跨个体的泛化能力仍不明确。预测不确定性的主要来源是时间历史依赖性还是空间传播依赖性，也尚不清楚。方法：为了解开这些因素，我们采用了一个共享的 MGN 主干网络，并使用固定的网格拓扑。利用 OpenSim-FEBio 工作流程构建了一个来自九个受试者的跑步试验数据集。我们开发了四种模型变体，以分离特定的依赖性：（1）基线 MGN；（2）CT-MGN，包含一个控制变换器（Control Transformer）来编码短时程历史；（3）MsgModMGN，将状态条件调制应用于消息传递，以实现自适应传播；（4）CT-MsgModMGN，结合了这两种机制。使用严格的分组3折交叉验证对未见过的受试者进行模型评估。结果：在全局准确性和空间一致性方面，包含历史编码的模型显著优于基线 MGN 和 MsgModMGN。至关重要的是，CT 模块有效地缓解了深度代理模型中常见的峰值削减缺陷，显著降低了峰值应力预测误差。相比之下，单独的空间传播调制未对基线产生显著改善，且与 CT 结合使用也未提供额外的益处。结论：时间历史依赖性，而非空间传播调制，是跨个体膝关节接触力学预测不确定性的主要驱动因素。显式编码短时程驱动序列使代理模型能够恢复隐式的相位信息，从而与纯粹基于状态的方法相比，在峰值应力捕获和高风险区域定位方面实现了卓越的保真度。
